## 🌐 7. API REST

### `apps/chatbot/api/serializers.py`

```python
"""
Serializers DRF pour l'API chatbot.
"""
from rest_framework import serializers

from apps.chatbot.models import Conversation, Message

class MessageSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    role_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_role_display", read_only=True)

    class Meta:
        model = Message
        fields = [
            "id",
            "role",
            "role_display",
            "contenu",
            "intent_detecte",
            "confiance_intent",
            "source_reponse",
            "sources_citees",
            "latence_ms",
            "feedbackpositif",
            "created_at",
        ]

class ConversationSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    dernier_message = serializers.SerializerMethodField()
    nombre_messages = serializers.IntegerField(read_only=True)

    class Meta:
        model = Conversation
        fields = [
            "id",
            "titre",
            "canal",
            "statut",
            "nombre_messages",
            "dernier_message",
            "created_at",
            "updated_at",
        ]

    def get_dernier_message(self, obj):
        dernier = obj.dernier_message
        if dernier:
            return MessageSerializer(dernier).data
        return None

class ConversationCreateSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    canal = serializers.ChoiceField(
        choices=["WEB", "MOBILE", "API"],
        default="WEB",
    )

class MessageSendSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    conversation_id = serializers.UUIDField(required=False)
    content = serializers.CharField(max_length=5000)

class FeedbackSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    message_id = serializers.UUIDField()
    feedback = serializers.ChoiceField(choices=["positive", "negative"])

class ConversationRatingSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    note = serializers.IntegerField(min_value=1, max_value=5)
    feedback = serializers.CharField(required=False, allow_blank=True)
```

### `apps/chatbot/api/views.py`

```python
"""
Vues API pour le chatbot.
"""
from rest_framework import generics, status
from rest_framework.permissions import IsAuthenticated
from rest_framework.response import Response
from rest_framework.views import APIView

from apps.chatbot.models import Conversation, Message
from apps.chatbot.services import ChatbotService

from .serializers import (
    ConversationSerializer,
    ConversationCreateSerializer,
    MessageSendSerializer,
    MessageSerializer,
    FeedbackSerializer,
    ConversationRatingSerializer,
)

class ConversationListView(generics.ListAPIView):
    """Liste des conversations de l'utilisateur."""
    serializer_class = ConversationSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def get_queryset(self):
        return Conversation.objects.filter(
            utilisateur=self.request.user,
        ).order_by("-updated_at")

class ConversationDetailView(generics.RetrieveAPIView):
    """Détail d'une conversation."""
    serializer_class = ConversationSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def get_queryset(self):
        return Conversation.objects.filter(utilisateur=self.request.user)

class ConversationCreateView(APIView):
    """Créer une nouvelle conversation."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def post(self, request):
        serializer = ConversationCreateSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        chatbot = ChatbotService()
        conversation = chatbot.creer_conversation(
            request.user,
            canal=serializer.validated_data["canal"],
        )

        return Response(
            ConversationSerializer(conversation).data,
            status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
        )

class MessageSendView(APIView):
    """Envoyer un message et recevoir une réponse."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def post(self, request):
        serializer = MessageSendSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        data = serializer.validated_data
        chatbot = ChatbotService()

        # Récupérer ou créer la conversation
        conversation_id = data.get("conversation_id")
        if conversation_id:
            try:
                conversation = Conversation.objects.get(
                    id=conversation_id,
                    utilisateur=request.user,
                )
            except Conversation.DoesNotExist:
                return Response(
                    {"error": "Conversation introuvable."},
                    status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
                )
        else:
            conversation = chatbot.creer_conversation(request.user, canal="API")

        # Traiter le message
        try:
            response_message = chatbot.traiter_message(
                conversation, data["content"]
            )

            return Response({
                "conversation_id": str(conversation.id),
                "user_message": data["content"],
                "assistant_message": MessageSerializer(response_message).data,
            }, status=status.HTTP_200_OK)

        except Exception as e:
            return Response(
                {"error": f"Erreur de traitement : {str(e)}"},
                status=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
            )

class ConversationMessagesView(generics.ListAPIView):
    """Historique des messages d'une conversation."""
    serializer_class = MessageSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def get_queryset(self):
        conversation_id = self.kwargs.get("conversation_id")
        return Message.objects.filter(
            conversation_id=conversation_id,
            conversation__utilisateur=self.request.user,
        ).order_by("created_at")

class MessageFeedbackView(APIView):
    """Donner un feedback sur une réponse."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def post(self, request):
        serializer = FeedbackSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        data = serializer.validated_data

        try:
            message = Message.objects.get(
                id=data["message_id"],
                conversation__utilisateur=request.user,
            )
            message.feedbackpositif = (data["feedback"] == "positive")
            message.save(update_fields=["feedbackpositif"])

            return Response({"message": "Feedback enregistré."})

        except Message.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Message introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )

class ConversationRateView(APIView):
    """Noter une conversation."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def post(self, request, conversation_id):
        serializer = ConversationRatingSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        try:
            conversation = Conversation.objects.get(
                id=conversation_id,
                utilisateur=request.user,
            )
            conversation.note_satisfaction = serializer.validated_data["note"]
            conversation.feedback_utilisateur = serializer.validated_data.get(
                "feedback", ""
            )
            conversation.save(update_fields=[
                "note_satisfaction", "feedback_utilisateur"
            ])

            return Response({"message": "Note enregistrée. Merci !"})

        except Conversation.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Conversation introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )
```

### `apps/chatbot/api/urls.py`

```python
"""
URLs de l'API chatbot.
"""
from django.urls import path

from . import views

app_name = "chatbot-api"

urlpatterns = [
    # Conversations
    path(
        "conversations/",
        views.ConversationListView.as_view(),
        name="conversations-list",
    ),
    path(
        "conversations/create/",
        views.ConversationCreateView.as_view(),
        name="conversations-create",
    ),
    path(
        "conversations/<uuid:pk>/",
        views.ConversationDetailView.as_view(),
        name="conversations-detail",
    ),
    path(
        "conversations/<uuid:conversation_id>/messages/",
        views.ConversationMessagesView.as_view(),
        name="conversations-messages",
    ),
    path(
        "conversations/<uuid:conversation_id>/rate/",
        views.ConversationRateView.as_view(),
        name="conversations-rate",
    ),

    # Messages
    path(
        "messages/send/",
        views.MessageSendView.as_view(),
        name="messages-send",
    ),
    path(
        "messages/feedback/",
        views.MessageFeedbackView.as_view(),
        name="messages-feedback",
    ),
]
```

## ⚙️ 8. Tâches Celery

### `apps/chatbot/tasks.py`

```python
"""
Tâches Celery pour l'app chatbot.
"""
import logging
from celery import shared_task
from django.db.models import Avg, Count, Sum
from django.utils import timezone

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

@shared_task(queue="chatbot")
def indexer_nouveaux_documents():
    """
    Indexe les nouveaux documents de la base de connaissances.
    """
    from apps.chatbot.services import RAGService

    rag = RAGService()
    result = rag.reindexer_tous()

    logger.info(
        f"Indexation RAG : {result['success']} succès, {result['error']} erreurs"
    )
    return result

@shared_task(queue="chatbot")
def aggreger_stats_chatbot():
    """
    Agrège les statistiques quotidiennes du chatbot.
    """
    from apps.chatbot.models import (
        Conversation, Message, AnalyticsChatbot,
    )

    today = timezone.now().date()
    yesterday = today - timezone.timedelta(days=1)

    # Statistiques de la veille
    conversations = Conversation.objects.filter(
        created_at__date=yesterday,
    )
    messages = Message.objects.filter(
        created_at__date=yesterday,
    )

    # Top intents
    top_intents = dict(
        messages.filter(role="USER")
        .exclude(intent_detecte="")
        .values_list("intent_detecte")
        .annotate(count=Count("id"))
        .values_list("intent_detecte", "count")[:10]
    )

    # Feedbacks
    feedbacks_positifs = messages.filter(
        role="ASSISTANT",
        feedbackpositif=True,
    ).count()
    feedbacks_negatifs = messages.filter(
        role="ASSISTANT",
        feedbackpositif=False,
    ).count()

    # Créer ou mettre à jour l'analytics
    analytics, _ = AnalyticsChatbot.objects.update_or_create(
        date=yesterday,
        defaults={
            "nombre_conversations": conversations.count(),
            "nombre_messages": messages.count(),
            "nombre_messages_utilisateur": messages.filter(role="USER").count(),
            "nombre_messages_assistant": messages.filter(role="ASSISTANT").count(),
            "tokens_total": messages.aggregate(total=Sum("tokens_total"))["total"] or 0,
            "top_intents": top_intents,
            "nombre_feedbacks_positifs": feedbacks_positifs,
            "nombre_feedbacks_negatifs": feedbacks_negatifs,
            "taux_satisfaction": (
                (feedbacks_positifs / (feedbacks_positifs + feedbacks_negatifs) * 100)
                if (feedbacks_positifs + feedbacks_negatifs) > 0 else 0
            ),
            "latence_moyenne_ms": int(
                messages.filter(role="ASSISTANT").aggregate(
                    avg=Avg("latence_ms")
                )["avg"] or 0
            ),
        },
    )

    logger.info(f"Stats chatbot agrégées pour {yesterday}")
    return {
        "date": str(yesterday),
        "conversations": analytics.nombre_conversations,
        "messages": analytics.nombre_messages,
    }

@shared_task(queue="chatbot")
def archiver_conversations_anciennes():
    """
    Archive les conversations inactives depuis plus de 30 jours.
    """
    from apps.chatbot.models import Conversation, StatutConversation

    seuil = timezone.now() - timezone.timedelta(days=30)

    count = Conversation.objects.filter(
        statut=StatutConversation.ACTIVE,
        dernier_message_at__lt=seuil,
    ).update(statut=StatutConversation.ARCHIVEE)

    logger.info(f"{count} conversations archivées")
    return count

@shared_task(queue="chatbot")
def synchroniser_catalogue vers_rag():
    """
    Synchronise le catalogue (formations, métiers, établissements)
    vers la base de connaissances RAG.
    """
    from apps.catalog.models import Formation, Metier, Etablissement
    from apps.chatbot.models import KnowledgeBase
    from apps.chatbot.services import RAGService

    rag = RAGService()
    nb_created = 0
    nb_updated = 0

    # Synchroniser les formations
    for formation in Formation.objects.filter(is_active=True):
        contenu = (
            f"{formation.nom}\n"
            f"Établissement: {formation.etablissement.nom}\n"
            f"Domaine: {formation.domaine.nom}\n"
            f"Niveau: {formation.get_niveau_display()}\n"
            f"Durée: {formation.duree_annees} ans\n"
            f"Coût annuel: {formation.cout_annuel} FCFA\n"
            f"Taux d'insertion: {formation.taux_insertion_12mois}%\n\n"
            f"{formation.description}"
        )

        doc, created = KnowledgeBase.objects.update_or_create(
            entity_type="FORMATION",
            entity_id=formation.id,
            defaults={
                "type_document": "FORMATION",
                "titre": formation.nom,
                "contenu": contenu,
                "contenu_resume": formation.description_courte,
                "tags": [formation.domaine.nom, formation.etablissement.ville],
            },
        )

        if created:
            nb_created += 1
        else:
            nb_updated += 1

        # Indexer si pas encore fait
        if not doc.embedding:
            rag.indexer_document(doc)

    # Synchroniser les métiers
    for metier in Metier.objects.filter(is_active=True):
        contenu = (
            f"{metier.nom}\n"
            f"Domaine: {metier.domaine.nom}\n"
            f"Niveau requis: {metier.get_niveau_etude_requis_display()}\n"
            f"Revenu moyen: {metier.revenu_moyen} FCFA/mois\n"
            f"Taux d'emploi: {metier.taux_emploi}%\n"
            f"Demande: {metier.get_demande_marche_display()}\n\n"
            f"{metier.description}"
        )

        doc, created = KnowledgeBase.objects.update_or_create(
            entity_type="METIER",
            entity_id=metier.id,
            defaults={
                "type_document": "METIER",
                "titre": metier.nom,
                "contenu": contenu,
                "contenu_resume": metier.description_courte,
                "tags": [metier.domaine.nom],
            },
        )

        if created:
            nb_created += 1
        else:
            nb_updated += 1

        if not doc.embedding:
            rag.indexer_document(doc)

    logger.info(
        f"Synchronisation catalogue → RAG : "
        f"{nb_created} créés, {nb_updated} mis à jour"
    )

    return {"created": nb_created, "updated": nb_updated}
```

## 🎨 9. Admin Django

### `apps/chatbot/admin.py`

```python
"""
Admin Django pour l'app chatbot.
"""
from django.contrib import admin
from django.utils.html import format_html
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .models import (
    Conversation, Message, KnowledgeBase,
    IntentPattern, AnalyticsChatbot,
)

class MessageInline(admin.TabularInline):
    model = Message
    extra = 0
    fields = ["role", "contenu_court", "intent_detecte", "source_reponse", "created_at"]
    readonly_fields = ["role", "contenu_court", "intent_detecte", "source_reponse", "created_at"]
    show_change_link = True
    max_num = 20

    def contenu_court(self, obj):
        return obj.contenu[:100] + "..." if len(obj.contenu) > 100 else obj.contenu
    contenu_court.short_description = _("Contenu")

@admin.register(Conversation)
class ConversationAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "titre_court",
        "utilisateur",
        "canal",
        "statut",
        "nombre_messages",
        "tokens_utilises",
        "note_satisfaction",
        "updated_at",
    ]
    list_filter = ["statut", "canal", "signale"]
    search_fields = ["titre", "utilisateur__email", "utilisateur__first_name"]
    readonly_fields = [
        "nombre_messages", "nombre_messages_utilisateur",
        "nombre_messages_assistant", "tokens_utilises",
        "cout_estime_usd", "created_at", "updated_at",
    ]
    inlines = [MessageInline]

    actions = ["archiver_conversations", "exporter_conversations"]

    def titre_court(self, obj):
        return obj.titre[:50] + "..." if len(obj.titre) > 50 else obj.titre
    titre_court.short_description = _("Titre")

    @admin.action(description="📦 Archiver les conversations sélectionnées")
    def archiver_conversations(self, request, queryset):
        count = queryset.update(statut="ARCHIVEE")
        self.message_user(request, f"{count} conversation(s) archivée(s).")

    @admin.action(description="📥 Exporter les conversations")
    def exporter_conversations(self, request, queryset):
        self.message_user(
            request,
            f"Export de {queryset.count()} conversation(s) (à implémenter)."
        )

@admin.register(Message)
class MessageAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "conversation",
        "role",
        "contenu_court",
        "intent_detecte",
        "source_reponse",
        "tokens_total",
        "latence_ms",
        "feedbackpositif_icon",
        "created_at",
    ]
    list_filter = ["role", "intent_detecte", "source_reponse", "feedbackpositif"]
    search_fields = ["contenu", "conversation__titre"]
    readonly_fields = ["created_at"]

    def contenu_court(self, obj):
        return obj.contenu[:80] + "..." if len(obj.contenu) > 80 else obj.contenu
    contenu_court.short_description = _("Contenu")

    def feedbackpositif_icon(self, obj):
        if obj.feedbackpositif is True:
            return format_html('<span style="color: green;">👍</span>')
        elif obj.feedbackpositif is False:
            return format_html('<span style="color: red;">👎</span>')
        return "—"
    feedbackpositif_icon.short_description = _("Feedback")

@admin.register(KnowledgeBase)
class KnowledgeBaseAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "titre",
        "type_document",
        "entity_type",
        "score_qualite",
        "nombre_utilisations",
        "is_indexed",
        "is_active",
    ]
    list_filter = ["type_document", "is_active", "is_public", "entity_type"]
    search_fields = ["titre", "contenu", "tags"]
    readonly_fields = ["embedding", "indexed_at", "created_at", "updated_at"]

    actions = ["reindexer_documents", "activer_documents", "desactiver_documents"]

    def is_indexed(self, obj):
        if obj.embedding:
            return format_html('<span style="color: green;">✅ Indexé</span>')
        return format_html('<span style="color: orange;">⏳ Non indexé</span>')
    is_indexed.short_description = _("Indexation")

    @admin.action(description="🔄 Réindexer les documents sélectionnés")
    def reindexer_documents(self, request, queryset):
        from apps.chatbot.services import RAGService
        rag = RAGService()
        nb = 0
        for doc in queryset:
            if rag.indexer_document(doc):
                nb += 1
        self.message_user(request, f"{nb} document(s) réindexé(s).")

    @admin.action(description="✅ Activer")
    def activer_documents(self, request, queryset):
        count = queryset.update(is_active=True)
        self.message_user(request, f"{count} document(s) activé(s).")

    @admin.action(description="❌ Désactiver")
    def desactiver_documents(self, request, queryset):
        count = queryset.update(is_active=False)
        self.message_user(request, f"{count} document(s) désactivé(s).")

@admin.register(IntentPattern)
class IntentPatternAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = ["intent", "priorite", "poids", "handler_class", "is_active"]
    list_filter = ["intent", "is_active"]
    search_fields = ["intent", "mots_cles"]

@admin.register(AnalyticsChatbot)
class AnalyticsChatbotAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "date",
        "nombre_conversations",
        "nombre_messages",
        "tokens_total",
        "taux_satisfaction",
        "latence_moyenne_ms",
    ]
    list_filter = ["date"]
    readonly_fields = ["created_at", "updated_at"]
    date_hierarchy = "date"
```

## 🧪 10. Tests

### `apps/chatbot/tests/factories.py`

```python
"""
Factories pour les tests chatbot.
"""
import factory
from factory.django import DjangoModelFactory

from apps.chatbot.models import Conversation, Message, KnowledgeBase, IntentPattern
from apps.accounts.tests.factories import StudentFactory

class ConversationFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = Conversation

    utilisateur = factory.SubFactory(StudentFactory)
    titre = factory.Sequence(lambda n: f"Conversation {n}")
    canal = "WEB"
    statut = "ACTIVE"

class MessageFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = Message

    conversation = factory.SubFactory(ConversationFactory)
    role = "USER"
    contenu = factory.Faker("sentence")

class KnowledgeBaseFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = KnowledgeBase

    type_document = "FORMATION"
    titre = factory.Sequence(lambda n: f"Document {n}")
    contenu = factory.Faker("paragraph")
    is_active = True
```

### `apps/chatbot/tests/test_services.py`

```python
"""
Tests des services chatbot.
"""
import pytest
from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock

from apps.chatbot.services import (
    IntentService, ModerationService, ContextService,
)
from apps.chatbot.tests.factories import ConversationFactory

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestIntentService:
    def test_detecter_salutation(self):
        result = IntentService.detecter_intent("bonjour", utiliser_llm=False)
        assert result["intent"] == "SALUTATIONS"
        assert result["confidence"] > 0

    def test_detecter_recherche_formation(self):
        result = IntentService.detecter_intent(
            "Je cherche une formation en informatique à Lomé",
            utiliser_llm=False,
        )
        assert result["intent"] == "CHERCHER_FORMATION"
        assert "domaine" in result["entities"]
        assert result["entities"]["domaine"] == "informatique"
        assert "ville" in result["entities"]

    def test_detecter_simulation_cout(self):
        result = IntentService.detecter_intent(
            "Combien coûte une formation ?",
            utiliser_llm=False,
        )
        assert result["intent"] == "SIMULER_COUT"

    def test_extraire_entites_budget(self):
        result = IntentService.detecter_intent(
            "Je cherche une formation à 500k FCFA",
            utiliser_llm=False,
        )
        assert result["entities"].get("budget") == 500000

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestModerationService:
    def test_message_valide(self):
        result = ModerationService.verifier_message("Bonjour, comment ça va ?")
        assert result["acceptable"] is True
        assert result["niveau_alerte"] == "none"

    def test_message_vide(self):
        result = ModerationService.verifier_message("")
        assert result["acceptable"] is False

    def test_message_trop_long(self):
        result = ModerationService.verifier_message("x" * 6000)
        assert result["acceptable"] is False

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestContextService:
    def test_construire_contexte(self):
        from apps.accounts.tests.factories import StudentFactory
        etudiant = StudentFactory()

        contexte = ContextService.construire_contexte(etudiant)

        assert "utilisateur" in contexte
        assert "profil" in contexte
        assert contexte["utilisateur"]["prenom"] == etudiant.first_name

    def test_formater_contexte_prompt(self):
        contexte = {
            "utilisateur": {"prenom": "Kossi", "nom": "Mensah"},
            "profil": {"centres_interet": ["informatique"]},
            "dernier_test": {"code_holland": "IRE", "score_global": 75},
            "favoris": {"total": 5},
            "voeux": {"actifs": 2},
            "prochaines_echeances": [],
        }

        prompt = ContextService.formater_contexte_prompt(contexte)

        assert "Kossi" in prompt
        assert "IRE" in prompt
        assert "informatique" in prompt
```

### `apps/chatbot/tests/test_handlers.py`

```python
"""
Tests des handlers chatbot.
"""
import pytest

from apps.chatbot.handlers import (
    FormationSearchHandler, MetierInfoHandler,
    DemarcheAdminHandler, FavorisHandler,
)
from apps.chatbot.tests.factories import ConversationFactory
from apps.catalog.tests.factories import FormationFactory, MetierFactory

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestFormationSearchHandler:
    def test_handle_avec_resultats(self):
        FormationFactory.create_batch(3, is_active=True)
        conversation = ConversationFactory()

        handler = FormationSearchHandler()
        result = handler.handle(
            message="Je cherche une formation",
            conversation=conversation,
            entities={},
        )

        assert "contenu" in result
        assert "formation" in result["contenu"].lower() or "🎓" in result["contenu"]

    def test_handle_sans_resultats(self):
        conversation = ConversationFactory()

        handler = FormationSearchHandler()
        result = handler.handle(
            message="formation en xyz123introuvable",
            conversation=conversation,
            entities={"domaine": "xyz123"},
        )

        assert "pas trouvé" in result["contenu"].lower() or "préciser" in result["contenu"].lower()

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestMetierInfoHandler:
    def test_handle_avec_metier(self):
        MetierFactory(nom="Développeur logiciel", is_active=True)
        conversation = ConversationFactory()

        handler = MetierInfoHandler()
        result = handler.handle(
            message="Parle-moi du métier de développeur",
            conversation=conversation,
            entities={"domaine": "informatique"},
        )

        assert "Développeur" in result["contenu"]
        assert "💼" in result["contenu"]

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestDemarcheAdminHandler:
    def test_handle_inscription(self):
        conversation = ConversationFactory()

        handler = DemarcheAdminHandler()
        result = handler.handle(
            message="Comment m'inscrire à l'université ?",
            conversation=conversation,
        )

        assert "inscription" in result["contenu"].lower()
        assert "étape" in result["contenu"].lower()
```

### `apps/chatbot/tests/test_api.py`

```python
"""
Tests de l'API chatbot.
"""
import pytest
from django.urls import reverse
from rest_framework import status
from rest_framework.test import APIClient

from apps.accounts.tests.factories import StudentFactory
from apps.chatbot.tests.factories import ConversationFactory, MessageFactory

@pytest.fixture
def api_client():
    return APIClient()

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestConversationAPI:
    def test_list_conversations(self, api_client):
        etudiant = StudentFactory()
        ConversationFactory.create_batch(3, utilisateur=etudiant)
        api_client.force_authenticate(user=etudiant)

        url = reverse("chatbot-api:conversations-list")
        response = api_client.get(url)

        assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_200_OK
        assert len(response.data["results"]) == 3

    def test_create_conversation(self, api_client):
        etudiant = StudentFactory()
        api_client.force_authenticate(user=etudiant)

        url = reverse("chatbot-api:conversations-create")
        response = api_client.post(url, {"canal": "WEB"}, format="json")

        assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_201_CREATED
        assert "id" in response.data

    def test_non_authentifie_refuse(self, api_client):
        url = reverse("chatbot-api:conversations-list")
        response = api_client.get(url)
        assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestMessageAPI:
    def test_send_message(self, api_client):
        """Test d'envoi d'un message (mock du LLM)."""
        etudiant = StudentFactory()
        api_client.force_authenticate(user=etudiant)

        # Créer d'abord une conversation
        conv_url = reverse("chatbot-api:conversations-create")
        conv_response = api_client.post(conv_url, {"canal": "API"}, format="json")
        conversation_id = conv_response.data["id"]

        # Envoyer un message
        url = reverse("chatbot-api:messages-send")
        data = {
            "conversation_id": conversation_id,
            "content": "Bonjour !",
        }

        # Mock du LLM pour éviter les appels réels
        with pytest.MonkeyPatch.context() as m:
            from apps.chatbot.services import LLMService
            m.setattr(
                LLMService,
                "generer_reponse",
                lambda self, *args, **kwargs: MagicMock(
                    contenu="Bonjour ! Comment puis-je vous aider ?",
                    tokens_prompt=10,
                    tokens_completion=15,
                    tokens_total=25,
                    modele="mock",
                    latence_ms=100,
                ),
            )

            response = api_client.post(url, data, format="json")

            assert response.status_code == status.HTTP_200_OK
            assert "assistant_message" in response.data
```

## ✅ Récapitulatif du Module 7

| Élément                                                                                                         | Statut |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| 5 modèles (Conversation, Message, KnowledgeBase, IntentPattern, AnalyticsChatbot)                               | ✅      |
| Enums complets (rôles, intents, sources, statuts)                                                               | ✅      |
| LLMService (abstraction OpenAI + Ollama)                                                                        | ✅      |
| RAGService (embeddings + similarité cosinus + fallback textuel)                                                 | ✅      |
| IntentService (détection hybride règles + LLM)                                                                  | ✅      |
| ContextService (contexte utilisateur enrichi)                                                                   | ✅      |
| ModerationService (filtrage basique)                                                                            | ✅      |
| ChatbotService (orchestrateur principal)                                                                        | ✅      |
| 9 handlers métier (formation, métier, coût, comparaison, orientation, démarches, favoris, événements, fallback) | ✅      |
| Templates de prompts (système, détection intent, suggestions)                                                   | ✅      |
| WebSocket Consumer (temps réel)                                                                                 | ✅      |
| Routing WebSocket                                                                                               | ✅      |
| API REST complète (conversations, messages, feedback)                                                           | ✅      |
| Tâches Celery (indexation, stats, archivage, sync catalogue)                                                    | ✅      |
| Admin Django sur-mesure                                                                                         | ✅      |
| Tests unitaires (services + handlers + API)                                                                     | ✅      |
| Factories de test                                                                                               | ✅      |
| Fixtures d'intents (9 patterns)                                                                                 | ✅      |

---

# 🚀 MODULE 8 — Application `community` (Forums, Messagerie, Mentorat)

Voici le **Module 8** complet du projet **AvenSU-Orienta**. Ce module constitue **l'espace communautaire** de la plateforme : forums thématiques pour échanger entre étudiants, messagerie privée, et surtout un système de mentorat mettant en relation des étudiants avec des conseillers, anciens élèves et professionnels.

---

## 📁 Structure de l'app `community`

├── __init__.py

├── models/

## 🗄️ 1. Modèles

### `apps/community/models/enums.py`

```python
"""
Énumérations pour l'app community.
"""
from django.db import models
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

class TypeForum(models.TextChoices):
    """Type de forum."""
    GENERAL = "GENERAL", _("💬 Forum général")
    DOMAINE = "DOMAINE", _("📚 Forum par domaine")
    ETABLISSEMENT = "ETABLISSEMENT", _("🏫 Forum par établissement")
    ENTRAIDE = "ENTRAIDE", _("🤝 Forum d'entraide")
    TEMOIGNAGE = "TEMOIGNAGE", _("🎤 Forum témoignages")
    OFFICIEL = "OFFICIEL", _("📢 Forum officiel (annonces)")

class StatutThread(models.TextChoices):
    """Statut d'un thread de discussion."""
    OUVERT = "OUVERT", _("🟢 Ouvert")
    RESOLU = "RESOLU", _("✅ Résolu")
    VERROUILLE = "VERROUILLE", _("🔒 Verrouillé")
    SIGNALE = "SIGNALE", _("⚠️ Signalé")
    SUPPRIME = "SUPPRIME", _("🗑️ Supprimé")
    EPINGLE = "EPINGLE", _("📌 Épinglé")

class TypeMessageForum(models.TextChoices):
    """Type de message dans un forum."""
    MESSAGE = "MESSAGE", _("Message standard")
    QUESTION = "QUESTION", _("Question")
    REPONSE = "REPONSE", _("Réponse")
    SOLUTION = "SOLUTION", _("Solution marquée")
    ANNOUNCE = "ANNONCE", _("Annonce officielle")

class StatutMentorat(models.TextChoices):
    """Statut d'une relation de mentorat."""
    EN_ATTENTE = "EN_ATTENTE", _("⏳ En attente d'acceptation")
    ACCEPTE = "ACCEPTE", _("✅ Accepté — Mentorat actif")
    REFUSE = "REFUSE", _("❌ Refusé")
    TERMINE = "TERMINE", _("🏁 Terminé")
    ANNULE = "ANNULE", _("🚫 Annulé")
    SUSPENDU = "SUSPENDU", _("⏸️ Suspendu")

class TypeMentor(models.TextChoices):
    """Type de mentor."""
    CONSEILLER = "CONSEILLER", _("🧑‍🏫 Conseiller d'orientation")
    ANCIEN = "ANCIEN", _("🎓 Ancien élève / Alumni")
    PROFESSIONNEL = "PROFESSIONNEL", _("💼 Professionnel")
    ENSEIGNANT = "ENSEIGNANT", _("👨‍🏫 Enseignant")
    PAIR = "PAIR", _("👥 Pair (étudiant expérimenté)")

class StatutMessagerie(models.TextChoices):
    """Statut d'un message privé."""
    ENVOYE = "ENVOYE", _("📤 Envoyé")
    LU = "LU", _("👁️ Lu")
    SUPPRIME_DESTINATAIRE = "SUPPRIME_DEST", _("🗑️ Supprimé par le destinataire")
    SUPPRIME_EXPEDITEUR = "SUPPRIME_EXP", _("🗑️ Supprimé par l'expéditeur")

class TypeSignalement(models.TextChoices):
    """Type de signalement pour modération."""
    SPAM = "SPAM", _("🚫 Spam")
    HARCELEMENT = "HARCELEMENT", _("⚠️ Harcèlement")
    CONTENU_INAPPROPRIE = "INAPPROPRIE", _("🔞 Contenu inapproprié")
    DESINFORMATION = "DESINFORMATION", _("❌ Désinformation")
    USURPATION = "USURPATION", _("🎭 Usurpation d'identité")
    AUTRE = "AUTRE", _("📌 Autre")

class StatutSignalement(models.TextChoices):
    """Statut d'un signalement."""
    EN_ATTENTE = "EN_ATTENTE", _("⏳ En attente de traitement")
    TRAITE = "TRAITE", _("✅ Traité")
    REJETE = "REJETE", _("❌ Rejeté (non fondé)")
    ACTION_PRISE = "ACTION_PRISE", _("⚡ Action prise (contenu supprimé, utilisateur sanctionné)")

class NiveauBlocage(models.TextChoices):
    """Niveau de blocage entre utilisateurs."""
    MASQUER_MESSAGES = "MASQUER", _("Masquer les messages")
    BLOQUER_CONTACT = "BLOQUER", _("Bloquer tout contact")
    SIGNALER_AUTO = "SIGNALER", _("Signaler automatiquement")
```

### `apps/community/models/forum.py`

```python
"""
Modèles Forum et Theme — structure des forums.
"""
import uuid
from django.db import models
from django.utils.text import slugify
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .enums import TypeForum

class Forum(models.Model):
    """
    Forum thématique de la communauté.
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(
        primary_key=True,
        default=uuid.uuid4,
        editable=False,
    )

    # ⭐ Informations générales
    nom = models.CharField(_("nom"), max_length=200)
    slug = models.SlugField(max_length=200, unique=True, blank=True)
    description = models.TextField(_("description"), blank=True)
    icone = models.CharField(
        _("icône (emoji)"),
        max_length=10,
        default="💬",
    )
    couleur = models.CharField(
        _("couleur (hex)"),
        max_length=7,
        default="#3B82F6",
    )

    # ⭐ Classification
    type = models.CharField(
        _("type de forum"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=TypeForum.choices,
        default=TypeForum.GENERAL,
    )

    # ⭐ Liens optionnels (selon le type)
    domaine = models.ForeignKey(
        "catalog.Domaine",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="forums",
        verbose_name=_("domaine associé"),
    )
    etablissement = models.ForeignKey(
        "catalog.Etablissement",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="forums",
        verbose_name=_("établissement associé"),
    )

    # ⭐ Règles et modération
    regles = models.TextField(
        _("règles du forum"),
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Règles spécifiques à ce forum"),
    )
    moderation_auto = models.BooleanField(
        _("modération automatique"),
        default=False,
        help_text=_("Les messages sont publiés après validation"),
    )

    # ⭐ Permissions
    acces_restreint = models.BooleanField(
        _("accès restreint"),
        default=False,
        help_text=_("Seuls certains rôles peuvent poster"),
    )
    roles_autorises = models.JSONField(
        _("rôles autorisés à poster"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Ex: ['STUDENT', 'COUNSELOR']"),
    )

    # ⭐ Statistiques
    nombre_threads = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    nombre_messages = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    nombre_abonnes = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    dernier_message_at = models.DateTimeField(
        _("date du dernier message"),
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )

    # ⭐ Statut
    is_active = models.BooleanField(_("actif"), default=True)
    is_featured = models.BooleanField(_("mis en avant"), default=False)
    ordre = models.PositiveIntegerField(_("ordre d'affichage"), default=0)

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("forum")
        verbose_name_plural = _("forums")
        ordering = ["ordre", "nom"]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.icone} {self.nom}"

    def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
        if not self.slug:
            self.slug = slugify(self.nom)
        super().save(*args, **kwargs)

class AbonnementForum(models.Model):
    """Abonnement d'un utilisateur à un forum."""
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)
    utilisateur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="abonnements_forums",
    )
    forum = models.ForeignKey(
        Forum,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="abonnements",
    )
    notifications_email = models.BooleanField(default=True)
    notifications_push = models.BooleanField(default=True)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("abonnement forum")
        verbose_name_plural = _("abonnements forums")
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["utilisateur", "forum"],
                name="unique_abonnement_forum",
            )
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.utilisateur} → {self.forum}"
```

### `apps/community/models/thread.py`

```python
"""
Modèle Thread — fil de discussion dans un forum.
"""
import uuid
from django.db import models
from django.utils.text import slugify
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .enums import StatutThread

class Thread(models.Model):
    """
    Thread (fil de discussion) dans un forum.
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(
        primary_key=True,
        default=uuid.uuid4,
        editable=False,
    )

    # ⭐ Liens
    forum = models.ForeignKey(
        "community.Forum",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="threads",
        verbose_name=_("forum"),
    )
    auteur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="threads_crees",
        verbose_name=_("auteur"),
    )

    # ⭐ Contenu
    titre = models.CharField(_("titre"), max_length=255)
    slug = models.SlugField(max_length=255, blank=True)
    contenu = models.TextField(
        _("contenu du premier message"),
        help_text=_("Contenu du message initial du thread"),
    )

    # ⭐ Classification
    tags = models.JSONField(
        _("tags"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Ex: ['orientation', 'informatique', 'bac+3']"),
    )

    # ⭐ Statut
    statut = models.CharField(
        _("statut"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=StatutThread.choices,
        default=StatutThread.OUVERT,
    )
    is_epingle = models.BooleanField(
        _("épinglé"),
        default=False,
        help_text=_("Les threads épinglés apparaissent en premier"),
    )
    is_ferme = models.BooleanField(
        _("fermé aux nouvelles réponses"),
        default=False,
    )

    # ⭐ Statistiques
    nombre_reponses = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    nombre_vues = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    nombre_signalements = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)

    # ⭐ Dernière activité
    dernier_message = models.ForeignKey(
        "community.MessageForum",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="+",
        verbose_name=_("dernier message"),
    )
    dernier_message_at = models.DateTimeField(
        _("date du dernier message"),
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )

    # ⭐ Résolution (pour les threads de type question)
    reponse_solution = models.ForeignKey(
        "community.MessageForum",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="threads_resolus",
        verbose_name=_("réponse marquée comme solution"),
    )

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("thread")
        verbose_name_plural = _("threads")
        ordering = ["-is_epingle", "-dernier_message_at"]
        indexes = [
            models.Index(fields=["forum", "-is_epingle", "-dernier_message_at"]),
            models.Index(fields=["auteur"]),
            models.Index(fields=["statut"]),
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return self.titre

    def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
        if not self.slug:
            base_slug = slugify(self.titre)
            slug = base_slug
            counter = 1
            while Thread.objects.filter(slug=slug, forum=self.forum).exclude(pk=self.pk).exists():
                slug = f"{base_slug}-{counter}"
                counter += 1
            self.slug = slug
        super().save(*args, **kwargs)

    @property
    def est_resolu(self) -> bool:
        return self.reponse_solution is not None

    @property
    def est_actif(self) -> bool:
        return self.statut not in [StatutThread.SUPPRIME, StatutThread.VERROUILLE]
```

### `apps/community/models/message.py`

```python
"""
Modèle MessageForum — message dans un thread.
"""
import uuid
from django.db import models
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .enums import TypeMessageForum

class MessageForum(models.Model):
    """
    Message individuel dans un thread de forum.
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(
        primary_key=True,
        default=uuid.uuid4,
        editable=False,
    )

    # ⭐ Liens
    thread = models.ForeignKey(
        "community.Thread",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="messages",
        verbose_name=_("thread"),
    )
    auteur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="messages_forum",
        verbose_name=_("auteur"),
    )

    # ⭐ Contenu
    contenu = models.TextField(_("contenu"))
    type = models.CharField(
        _("type de message"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=TypeMessageForum.choices,
        default=TypeMessageForum.MESSAGE,
    )

    # ⭐ Réponse à un autre message (fil de discussion imbriqué)
    reponse_a = models.ForeignKey(
        "self",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="reponses",
        verbose_name=_("réponse à"),
    )

    # ⭐ Pièces jointes
    pieces_jointes = models.JSONField(
        _("pièces jointes"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Liste d'URLs de fichiers joints"),
    )

    # ⭐ Engagement
    nombre_likes = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    nombre_signalements = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    is_solution = models.BooleanField(
        _("marqué comme solution"),
        default=False,
    )
    is_edite = models.BooleanField(_("édité"), default=False)
    is_supprime = models.BooleanField(
        _("supprimé (soft delete)"),
        default=False,
    )

    # ⭐ Modération
    est_valide = models.BooleanField(
        _("validé par modération"),
        default=True,
    )
    motif_moderation = models.TextField(
        _("motif de modération"),
        blank=True,
    )

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)
    edited_at = models.DateTimeField(
        _("date de dernière édition"),
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("message de forum")
        verbose_name_plural = _("messages de forum")
        ordering = ["created_at"]
        indexes = [
            models.Index(fields=["thread", "created_at"]),
            models.Index(fields=["auteur"]),
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"Message de {self.auteur} dans '{self.thread.titre[:30]}'"

class LikeMessageForum(models.Model):
    """Like sur un message de forum."""
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)
    utilisateur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="likes_forum",
    )
    message = models.ForeignKey(
        MessageForum,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="likes",
    )
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["utilisateur", "message"],
                name="unique_like_message_forum",
            )
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.utilisateur} ❤️ {self.message.id}"
```

### `apps/community/models/mentorat.py`

```python
"""
Modèle Mentorat — mise en relation mentor ↔ mentoré.
"""
import uuid
from django.db import models
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .enums import StatutMentorat, TypeMentor

class ProfilMentor(models.Model):
    """
    Profil de mentor (extension du profil utilisateur).
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)

    # ⭐ Lien utilisateur
    utilisateur = models.OneToOneField(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="profil_mentor",
        verbose_name=_("utilisateur"),
    )

    # ⭐ Informations mentor
    type_mentor = models.CharField(
        _("type de mentor"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=TypeMentor.choices,
        default=TypeMentor.PAIR,
    )
    bio = models.TextField(
        _("biographie"),
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Présentation du mentor, son parcours, ses compétences"),
    )

    # ⭐ Compétences et domaines
    domaines_expertise = models.JSONField(
        _("domaines d'expertise"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Ex: ['Informatique', 'Santé', 'Droit']"),
    )
    competences = models.JSONField(
        _("compétences"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
    )

    # ⭐ Expérience
    annees_experience = models.PositiveIntegerField(
        _("années d'expérience"),
        default=0,
    )
    etablissement = models.ForeignKey(
        "catalog.Etablissement",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="mentors",
        verbose_name=_("établissement d'attache"),
    )
    diplomes = models.JSONField(
        _("diplômes"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
    )

    # ⭐ Disponibilité
    is_disponible = models.BooleanField(
        _("disponible pour mentorat"),
        default=True,
    )
    nombre_mentores_max = models.PositiveIntegerField(
        _("nombre max de mentorés"),
        default=5,
        help_text=_("Nombre maximum de mentorés simultanés"),
    )
    creneaux_disponibles = models.JSONField(
        _("créneaux de disponibilité"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_(
            "Ex: [{'jour': 'lundi', 'debut': '18:00', 'fin': '20:00'}]"
        ),
    )

    # ⭐ Modalités
    formats_proposes = models.JSONField(
        _("formats de mentorat proposés"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Ex: ['chat', 'visio', 'presentiel']"),
    )
    langues_parlees = models.JSONField(
        _("langues parlées"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Ex: ['Français', 'Anglais', 'Ewe']"),
    )

    # ⭐ Statistiques
    nombre_mentores_actuels = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    nombre_mentores_total = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)
    note_moyenne = models.DecimalField(
        _("note moyenne"),
        max_digits=3,
        decimal_places=2,
        default=0,
    )
    nombre_evaluations = models.PositiveIntegerField(default=0)

    # ⭐ Vérification
    is_verifie = models.BooleanField(
        _("profil vérifié"),
        default=False,
        help_text=_("Profil vérifié par l'équipe AvenSU"),
    )
    date_verification = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("profil mentor")
        verbose_name_plural = _("profils mentors")

    def __str__(self):
        return f"Mentor {self.utilisateur.get_full_name()} ({self.get_type_mentor_display()})"

    @property
    def places_disponibles(self) -> int:
        return max(0, self.nombre_mentores_max - self.nombre_mentores_actuels)

    @property
    def peut_accepter_mentore(self) -> bool:
        return self.is_disponible and self.places_disponibles > 0

class RelationMentorat(models.Model):
    """
    Relation de mentorat entre un mentor et un mentoré.
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)

    # ⭐ Acteurs
    mentor = models.ForeignKey(
        ProfilMentor,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="mentorats_comme_mentor",
        verbose_name=_("mentor"),
    )
    mentoré = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="mentorats_comme_mentore",
        verbose_name=_("mentoré"),
        limit_choices_to={"role": "STUDENT"},
    )

    # ⭐ Statut
    statut = models.CharField(
        _("statut"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=StatutMentorat.choices,
        default=StatutMentorat.EN_ATTENTE,
    )

    # ⭐ Détails
    motif_demande = models.TextField(
        _("motif de la demande"),
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Pourquoi l'étudiant souhaite ce mentorat"),
    )
    objectifs = models.JSONField(
        _("objectifs du mentorat"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Ex: ['Choisir une formation', 'Préparer un concours']"),
    )

    # ⭐ Dates
    date_demande = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    date_reponse = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    date_debut = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    date_fin = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    # ⭐ Suivi
    nombre_seances = models.PositiveIntegerField(
        _("nombre de séances réalisées"),
        default=0,
    )
    derniere_seance = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    notes_mentor = models.TextField(_("notes du mentor"), blank=True)
    notes_mentore = models.TextField(_("notes du mentoré"), blank=True)

    # ⭐ Évaluation finale
    evaluation_mentore = models.JSONField(
        _("évaluation par le mentoré"),
        default=dict,
        blank=True,
        help_text=_("Note, commentaire, recommandation"),
    )
    evaluation_mentor = models.JSONField(
        _("évaluation par le mentor"),
        default=dict,
        blank=True,
    )

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("relation de mentorat")
        verbose_name_plural = _("relations de mentorat")
        ordering = ["-date_demande"]
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["mentor", "mentoré"],
                name="unique_relation_mentorat",
            )
        ]
        indexes = [
            models.Index(fields=["mentor", "statut"]),
            models.Index(fields=["mentoré", "statut"]),
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return (
            f"{self.mentoré.get_full_name()} ↔ "
            f"{self.mentor.utilisateur.get_full_name()} ({self.get_statut_display()})"
        )

    @property
    def duree_jours(self) -> int | None:
        if not self.date_debut:
            return None
        from django.utils import timezone
        fin = self.date_fin or timezone.now()
        return (fin - self.date_debut).days

class SeanceMentorat(models.Model):
    """
    Séance de mentorat (échange planifié).
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)

    relation = models.ForeignKey(
        RelationMentorat,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="seances",
        verbose_name=_("relation de mentorat"),
    )

    titre = models.CharField(_("titre"), max_length=255)
    description = models.TextField(_("description"), blank=True)
    date_prevue = models.DateTimeField(_("date prévue"))
    duree_minutes = models.PositiveIntegerField(
        _("durée prévue (minutes)"),
        default=60,
    )
    format = models.CharField(
        _("format"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=[
            ("CHAT", "💬 Chat"),
            ("VISIO", "💻 Visioconférence"),
            ("PRESENTIEL", "🏢 Présentiel"),
            ("TELEPHONE", "📞 Téléphone"),
        ],
        default="CHAT",
    )
    lien_visio = models.URLField(_("lien visio"), blank=True)

    statut = models.CharField(
        _("statut"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=[
            ("PLANIFIEE", "📅 Planifiée"),
            ("CONFIRMEE", "✅ Confirmée"),
            ("REALISEE", "🏁 Réalisée"),
            ("ANNULEE", "❌ Annulée"),
            ("NO_SHOW", "🚫 No-show"),
        ],
        default="PLANIFIEE",
    )

    # Compte-rendu
    compte_rendu = models.TextField(_("compte-rendu"), blank=True)
    prochaines_etapes = models.JSONField(
        _("prochaines étapes"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
    )

    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("séance de mentorat")
        verbose_name_plural = _("séances de mentorat")
        ordering = ["-date_prevue"]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.titre} ({self.date_prevue.strftime('%d/%m/%Y')})"
```

### `apps/community/models/messagerie.py`

```python
"""
Modèles Messagerie — messagerie privée entre utilisateurs.
"""
import uuid
from django.db import models
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .enums import StatutMessagerie

class ConversationPrivee(models.Model):
    """
    Conversation privée entre 2 utilisateurs (ou plus pour groupes).
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)

    # ⭐ Participants
    participants = models.ManyToManyField(
        "accounts.User",
        related_name="conversations_privees",
        verbose_name=_("participants"),
        through="ParticipantConversation",
    )

    # ⭐ Métadonnées
    titre = models.CharField(
        _("titre (pour groupes)"),
        max_length=200,
        blank=True,
    )
    is_groupe = models.BooleanField(
        _("conversation de groupe"),
        default=False,
    )

    # ⭐ Statut
    is_archived = models.BooleanField(_("archivée"), default=False)

    # ⭐ Dernier message
    dernier_message = models.ForeignKey(
        "MessagePrive",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="+",
    )
    dernier_message_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("conversation privée")
        verbose_name_plural = _("conversations privées")
        ordering = ["-dernier_message_at", "-updated_at"]

    def __str__(self):
        if self.titre:
            return self.titre
        participants = list(self.participants.all()[:3])
        noms = [p.get_full_name() for p in participants]
        return ", ".join(noms)

class ParticipantConversation(models.Model):
    """Participant à une conversation privée (avec métadonnées)."""
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)
    utilisateur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="participations_conversations",
    )
    conversation = models.ForeignKey(
        ConversationPrivee,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="participant_details",
    )

    # Métadonnées par participant
    dernier_message_lu = models.ForeignKey(
        "MessagePrive",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="+",
    )
    date_derniere_lecture = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    is_muted = models.BooleanField(_("notifications en sourdine"), default=False)
    is_archived = models.BooleanField(_("archivée pour ce participant"), default=False)
    joined_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["utilisateur", "conversation"],
                name="unique_participant_conversation",
            )
        ]

    @property
    def nombre_non_lus(self) -> int:
        if not self.dernier_message_lu:
            return self.conversation.messages.count()
        return self.conversation.messages.filter(
            created_at__gt=self.dernier_message_lu.created_at,
        ).exclude(auteur=self.utilisateur).count()

class MessagePrive(models.Model):
    """
    Message privé dans une conversation.
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)

    conversation = models.ForeignKey(
        ConversationPrivee,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="messages",
        verbose_name=_("conversation"),
    )
    auteur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="messages_prives_envoyes",
        verbose_name=_("auteur"),
    )

    # ⭐ Contenu
    contenu = models.TextField(_("contenu"))
    type_contenu = models.CharField(
        _("type de contenu"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=[
            ("TEXTE", "Texte"),
            ("IMAGE", "Image"),
            ("FICHIER", "Fichier"),
            ("AUDIO", "Audio"),
            ("SYSTEM", "Système"),
        ],
        default="TEXTE",
    )
    fichier_joint = models.FileField(
        _("fichier joint"),
        upload_to="messagerie/fichiers/%Y/%m/",
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )

    # ⭐ Statut
    statut = models.CharField(
        _("statut"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=StatutMessagerie.choices,
        default=StatutMessagerie.ENVOYE,
    )
    is_edite = models.BooleanField(_("édité"), default=False)
    is_supprime = models.BooleanField(_("supprimé"), default=False)

    # ⭐ Réponse à
    reponse_a = models.ForeignKey(
        "self",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="reponses",
    )

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)
    edited_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    lu_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("message privé")
        verbose_name_plural = _("messages privés")
        ordering = ["created_at"]
        indexes = [
            models.Index(fields=["conversation", "created_at"]),
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"MP de {self.auteur} à {self.conversation}"
```

### `apps/community/models/moderation.py`

```python
"""
Modèles Modération — signalements et blocages.
"""
import uuid
from django.db import models
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .enums import TypeSignalement, StatutSignalement, NiveauBlocage

class Signalement(models.Model):
    """
    Signalement d'un contenu ou d'un utilisateur.
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)

    # ⭐ Auteur du signalement
    auteur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="signalements_faits",
        verbose_name=_("auteur du signalement"),
    )

    # ⭐ Contenu signalé (polymorphe)
    type_contenu = models.CharField(
        _("type de contenu signalé"),
        max_length=30,
        choices=[
            ("MESSAGE_FORUM", "Message de forum"),
            ("THREAD", "Thread"),
            ("MESSAGE_PRIVE", "Message privé"),
            ("UTILISATEUR", "Utilisateur"),
            ("MENTOR", "Profil mentor"),
        ],
    )
    contenu_id = models.UUIDField(_("ID du contenu"))
    contenu_resume = models.CharField(
        _("résumé du contenu"),
        max_length=255,
        blank=True,
    )

    # ⭐ Détails du signalement
    type = models.CharField(
        _("type de signalement"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=TypeSignalement.choices,
    )
    description = models.TextField(
        _("description détaillée"),
        blank=True,
    )
    preuves = models.JSONField(
        _("preuves (URLs captures)"),
        default=list,
        blank=True,
    )

    # _traitement
    statut = models.CharField(
        _("statut"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=StatutSignalement.choices,
        default=StatutSignalement.EN_ATTENTE,
    )
    traite_par = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        related_name="signalements_traites",
        verbose_name=_("traité par"),
    )
    date_traitement = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)
    decision = models.TextField(_("décision / commentaire"), blank=True)
    action_prise = models.CharField(
        _("action prise"),
        max_length=255,
        blank=True,
    )

    # Timestamps
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("signalement")
        verbose_name_plural = _("signalements")
        ordering = ["-created_at"]
        indexes = [
            models.Index(fields=["statut", "-created_at"]),
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"Signalement {self.get_type_display()} par {self.auteur}"

class BlocageUtilisateur(models.Model):
    """
    Blocage entre deux utilisateurs.
    """
    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4, editable=False)

    bloqueur = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="blocages_effectues",
        verbose_name=_("utilisateur qui bloque"),
    )
    bloque = models.ForeignKey(
        "accounts.User",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
        related_name="blocages_subis",
        verbose_name=_("utilisateur bloqué"),
    )

    niveau = models.CharField(
        _("niveau de blocage"),
        max_length=20,
        choices=NiveauBlocage.choices,
        default=NiveauBlocage.BLOQUER_CONTACT,
    )
    motif = models.TextField(_("motif"), blank=True)

    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)

    class Meta:
        verbose_name = _("blocage utilisateur")
        verbose_name_plural = _("blocages utilisateur")
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["bloqueur", "bloque"],
                name="unique_blocage",
            )
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return f"{self.bloqueur} bloque {self.bloque}"
```

## 📊 2. Managers

### `apps/community/managers.py`

```python
"""
Managers personnalisés pour l'app community.
"""
from django.db import models
from django.db.models import Q, Count
from django.utils import timezone

class ForumManager(models.Manager):
    def actifs(self):
        return self.filter(is_active=True)

    def publics(self):
        return self.actifs().filter(acces_restreint=False)

    def par_type(self, type_forum):
        return self.actifs().filter(type=type_forum)

    def featured(self):
        return self.actifs().filter(is_featured=True)

class ThreadManager(models.Manager):
    def actifs(self):
        return self.exclude(statut__in=["SUPPRIME", "VERROUILLE"])

    def par_forum(self, forum_id):
        return self.actifs().filter(forum_id=forum_id)

    def resolu(self):
        return self.filter(reponse_solution__isnull=False)

    def non_resolu(self):
        return self.filter(reponse_solution__isnull=False)

    def populaires(self, limit=20):
        return self.actifs().order_by("-nombre_vues", "-nombre_reponses")[:limit]

    def recents(self, limit=20):
        return self.actifs().order_by("-dernier_message_at")[:limit]

class MessageForumManager(models.Manager):
    def non_supprimes(self):
        return self.filter(is_supprime=False)

    def valides(self):
        return self.non_supprimes().filter(est_valide=True)

    def par_auteur(self, auteur):
        return self.filter(auteur=auteur, is_supprime=False)

class ProfilMentorManager(models.Manager):
    def disponibles(self):
        return self.filter(is_disponible=True).filter(
            Q(nombre_mentores_max__gt=models.F("nombre_mentores_actuels"))
        )

    def verifies(self):
        return self.filter(is_verifie=True)

    def par_type(self, type_mentor):
        return self.filter(type_mentor=type_mentor)

    def par_domaine(self, domaine_nom):
        return self.filter(domaines_expertise__contains=[domaine_nom])

    def top_notes(self, limit=10):
        return self.filter(nombre_evaluations__gt=0).order_by(
            "-note_moyenne", "-nombre_evaluations"
        )[:limit]

class RelationMentoratManager(models.Manager):
    def actives(self):
        return self.filter(statut="ACCEPTE")

    def en_attente(self, utilisateur=None):
        qs = self.filter(statut="EN_ATTENTE")
        if utilisateur:
            qs = qs.filter(Q(mentor__utilisateur=utilisateur) | Q(mentoré=utilisateur))
        return qs

    def pour_mentor(self, mentor):
        return self.filter(mentor=mentor)

    def pour_mentore(self, mentore):
        return self.filter(mentoré=mentore)

class ConversationPriveeManager(models.Manager):
    def pour_utilisateur(self, utilisateur):
        return self.filter(participants=utilisateur)

    def non_archives(self, utilisateur):
        return self.pour_utilisateur(utilisateur).filter(
            participant_details__utilisateur=utilisateur,
            participant_details__is_archived=False,
        )

    def avec_non_lus(self, utilisateur):
        """Conversations avec messages non lus."""
        return self.pour_utilisateur(utilisateur).filter(
            dernier_message_at__gt=models.F(
                "participant_details__date_derniere_lecture"
            ),
        )

class MessagePriveManager(models.Manager):
    def non_lus(self, utilisateur):
        """Messages non lus pour un utilisateur."""
        from .messagerie import ParticipantConversation

        participations = ParticipantConversation.objects.filter(
            utilisateur=utilisateur
        ).select_related("conversation")

        message_ids = []
        for p in participations:
            qs = p.conversation.messages.exclude(auteur=utilisateur)
            if p.dernier_message_lu:
                qs = qs.filter(created_at__gt=p.dernier_message_lu.created_at)
            message_ids.extend(qs.values_list("id", flat=True))

        return self.filter(id__in=message_ids)
```
