## 🧠 3. Services métier

### `apps/community/services/forum_service.py`

```python
"""
Service Forum — logique métier des forums.
"""
import logging
from django.db import transaction
from django.db.models import F
from django.utils import timezone

from apps.community.models import (
    Forum, Thread, MessageForum, AbonnementForum,
    LikeMessageForum, StatutThread,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class ForumService:
    """Service de gestion des forums."""

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def creer_thread(
        cls,
        forum: Forum,
        auteur,
        titre: str,
        contenu: str,
        tags: list = None,
    ) -> Thread:
        """Crée un nouveau thread avec son premier message."""
        # Vérifier les permissions
        if forum.acces_restreint:
            if auteur.role not in (forum.roles_autorises or []):
                raise PermissionError(
                    "Vous n'avez pas la permission de poster dans ce forum."
                )

        # Créer le thread
        thread = Thread.objects.create(
            forum=forum,
            auteur=auteur,
            titre=titre,
            contenu=contenu,
            tags=tags or [],
        )

        # Créer le premier message
        premier_message = MessageForum.objects.create(
            thread=thread,
            auteur=auteur,
            contenu=contenu,
            type="QUESTION",
        )

        # Mettre à jour le thread
        thread.dernier_message = premier_message
        thread.dernier_message_at = premier_message.created_at
        thread.save(update_fields=["dernier_message", "dernier_message_at"])

        # Mettre à jour les stats du forum
        forum.nombre_threads = F("nombre_threads") + 1
        forum.nombre_messages = F("nombre_messages") + 1
        forum.dernier_message_at = premier_message.created_at
        forum.save(update_fields=[
            "nombre_threads", "nombre_messages", "dernier_message_at"
        ])

        # Notifier les abonnés
        cls._notifier_abonnes(forum, thread, auteur)

        return thread

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def repondre_thread(
        cls,
        thread: Thread,
        auteur,
        contenu: str,
        reponse_a: MessageForum = None,
    ) -> MessageForum:
        """Ajoute une réponse à un thread."""
        if thread.is_ferme or not thread.est_actif:
            raise PermissionError("Ce thread est fermé aux nouvelles réponses.")

        # Vérifier modération auto
        est_valide = not thread.forum.moderation_auto

        message = MessageForum.objects.create(
            thread=thread,
            auteur=auteur,
            contenu=contenu,
            reponse_a=reponse_a,
            type="REPONSE",
            est_valide=est_valide,
        )

        # Mettre à jour le thread
        thread.nombre_reponses = F("nombre_reponses") + 1
        thread.dernier_message = message
        thread.dernier_message_at = message.created_at
        thread.save(update_fields=[
            "nombre_reponses", "dernier_message", "dernier_message_at"
        ])

        # Mettre à jour le forum
        thread.forum.nombre_messages = F("nombre_messages") + 1
        thread.forum.dernier_message_at = message.created_at
        thread.forum.save(update_fields=["nombre_messages", "dernier_message_at"])

        return message

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def marquer_comme_solution(
        cls,
        thread: Thread,
        message: MessageForum,
        utilisateur,
    ):
        """Marque un message comme solution (seul l'auteur du thread peut)."""
        if thread.auteur != utilisateur:
            raise PermissionError(
                "Seul l'auteur du thread peut marquer une solution."
            )

        # Retirer l'ancien marquage
        if thread.reponse_solution:
            thread.reponse_solution.is_solution = False
            thread.reponse_solution.save(update_fields=["is_solution"])

        # Marquer le nouveau
        message.is_solution = True
        message.save(update_fields=["is_solution"])

        thread.reponse_solution = message
        thread.statut = StatutThread.RESOLU
        thread.save(update_fields=["reponse_solution", "statut", "updated_at"])

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def toggle_like(cls, utilisateur, message: MessageForum) -> bool:
        """Ajoute ou retire un like. Retourne True si ajouté, False si retiré."""
        like, created = LikeMessageForum.objects.get_or_create(
            utilisateur=utilisateur,
            message=message,
        )

        if not created:
            like.delete()
            message.nombre_likes = F("nombre_likes") - 1
            message.save(update_fields=["nombre_likes"])
            return False
        else:
            message.nombre_likes = F("nombre_likes") + 1
            message.save(update_fields=["nombre_likes"])
            return True

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def abonner_utilisateur(cls, utilisateur, forum: Forum) -> AbonnementForum:
        """Abonne un utilisateur à un forum."""
        abonnement, created = AbonnementForum.objects.get_or_create(
            utilisateur=utilisateur,
            forum=forum,
        )

        if created:
            forum.nombre_abonnes = F("nombre_abonnes") + 1
            forum.save(update_fields=["nombre_abonnes"])

        return abonnement

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def desabonner_utilisateur(cls, utilisateur, forum: Forum):
        """Désabonne un utilisateur d'un forum."""
        deleted, _ = AbonnementForum.objects.filter(
            utilisateur=utilisateur,
            forum=forum,
        ).delete()

        if deleted:
            forum.nombre_abonnes = F("nombre_abonnes") - 1
            forum.save(update_fields=["nombre_abonnes"])

    @classmethod
    def incrementer_vues(cls, thread: Thread):
        """Incrémente le compteur de vues d'un thread."""
        Thread.objects.filter(pk=thread.pk).update(
            nombre_vues=F("nombre_vues") + 1
        )

    @classmethod
    def _notifier_abonnes(cls, forum: Forum, thread: Thread, auteur):
        """Envoie des notifications aux abonnés du forum."""
        # TODO: Intégrer avec le service de notifications
        abonnés = AbonnementForum.objects.filter(
            forum=forum,
            notifications_push=True,
        ).exclude(utilisateur=auteur)

        logger.info(
            f"Nouveau thread '{thread.titre}' dans {forum.nom} — "
            f"{abonnés.count()} abonnés à notifier"
        )
```

### `apps/community/services/mentorat_service.py`

```python
"""
Service Mentorat — logique métier du mentorat.
"""
import logging
from django.db import transaction
from django.db.models import F, Avg
from django.utils import timezone

from apps.community.models import (
    ProfilMentor, RelationMentorat, SeanceMentorat,
    StatutMentorat,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class MentoratService:
    """Service de gestion du mentorat."""

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def demander_mentorat(
        cls,
        mentor: ProfilMentor,
        mentoré,
        motif: str = "",
        objectifs: list = None,
    ) -> RelationMentorat:
        """Crée une demande de mentorat."""
        # Vérifications
        if not mentor.peut_accepter_mentore:
            raise ValueError(
                "Ce mentor n'est pas disponible ou a atteint sa limite de mentorés."
            )

        if mentor.utilisateur == mentoré:
            raise ValueError("Vous ne pouvez pas être votre propre mentor.")

        # Vérifier si une relation existe déjà
        if RelationMentorat.objects.filter(
            mentor=mentor,
            mentoré=mentoré,
        ).exclude(statut__in=[StatutMentorat.REFUSE, StatutMentorat.ANNULE]).exists():
            raise ValueError("Une relation de mentorat existe déjà entre vous.")

        relation = RelationMentorat.objects.create(
            mentor=mentor,
            mentoré=mentoré,
            motif_demande=motif,
            objectifs=objectifs or [],
        )

        logger.info(
            f"Demande de mentorat : {mentoré.email} → "
            f"{mentor.utilisateur.get_full_name()}"
        )

        return relation

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def accepter_mentorat(cls, relation: RelationMentorat):
        """Accepte une demande de mentorat."""
        if relation.statut != StatutMentorat.EN_ATTENTE:
            raise ValueError("Cette demande n'est pas en attente.")

        relation.statut = StatutMentorat.ACCEPTE
        relation.date_reponse = timezone.now()
        relation.date_debut = timezone.now()
        relation.save(update_fields=[
            "statut", "date_reponse", "date_debut", "updated_at"
        ])

        # Mettre à jour les compteurs du mentor
        mentor = relation.mentor
        mentor.nombre_mentores_actuels = F("nombre_mentores_actuels") + 1
        mentor.save(update_fields=["nombre_mentores_actuels"])

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def refuser_mentorat(cls, relation: RelationMentorat, motif: str = ""):
        """Refuse une demande de mentorat."""
        relation.statut = StatutMentorat.REFUSE
        relation.date_reponse = timezone.now()
        relation.notes_mentor = motif
        relation.save(update_fields=[
            "statut", "date_reponse", "notes_mentor", "updated_at"
        ])

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def terminer_mentorat(
        cls,
        relation: RelationMentorat,
        evaluation_mentore: dict = None,
        evaluation_mentor: dict = None,
    ):
        """Termine une relation de mentorat."""
        relation.statut = StatutMentorat.TERMINE
        relation.date_fin = timezone.now()

        if evaluation_mentore:
            relation.evaluation_mentore = evaluation_mentore
        if evaluation_mentor:
            relation.evaluation_mentor = evaluation_mentor

        relation.save()

        # Mettre à jour les compteurs
        mentor = relation.mentor
        mentor.nombre_mentores_actuels = F("nombre_mentores_actuels") - 1
        mentor.nombre_mentores_total = F("nombre_mentores_total") + 1

        # Recalculer la note moyenne si évaluation
        if evaluation_mentore and "note" in evaluation_mentore:
            cls._recalculer_note_mentor(mentor)

        mentor.save()

    @classmethod
    def _recalculer_note_mentor(cls, mentor: ProfilMentor):
        """Recalcule la note moyenne d'un mentor."""
        evaluations = (
            RelationMentorat.objects
            .filter(mentor=mentor, statut=StatutMentorat.TERMINE)
            .exclude(evaluation_mentore={})
        )

        notes = [
            e.evaluation_mentore.get("note", 0)
            for e in evaluations
            if e.evaluation_mentore.get("note")
        ]

        if notes:
            mentor.note_moyenne = round(sum(notes) / len(notes), 2)
            mentor.nombre_evaluations = len(notes)

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def planifier_seance(
        cls,
        relation: RelationMentorat,
        titre: str,
        date_prevue,
        duree_minutes: int = 60,
        format_seance: str = "CHAT",
        description: str = "",
    ) -> SeanceMentorat:
        """Planifie une séance de mentorat."""
        if relation.statut != StatutMentorat.ACCEPTE:
            raise ValueError("La relation de mentorat n'est pas active.")

        seance = SeanceMentorat.objects.create(
            relation=relation,
            titre=titre,
            date_prevue=date_prevue,
            duree_minutes=duree_minutes,
            format=format_seance,
            description=description,
        )

        return seance

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def marquer_seance_realisee(
        cls,
        seance: SeanceMentorat,
        compte_rendu: str = "",
        prochaines_etapes: list = None,
    ):
        """Marque une séance comme réalisée."""
        seance.statut = "REALISEE"
        seance.compte_rendu = compte_rendu
        seance.prochaines_etapes = prochaines_etapes or []
        seance.save()

        # Mettre à jour la relation
        relation = seance.relation
        relation.nombre_seances = F("nombre_seances") + 1
        relation.derniere_seance = timezone.now()
        relation.save()

    @classmethod
    def get_mentors_disponibles(
        cls,
        domaine: str = None,
        type_mentor: str = None,
        limit: int = 20,
    ) -> list:
        """Retourne les mentors disponibles avec filtres."""
        qs = ProfilMentor.objects.disponibles().select_related("utilisateur")

        if domaine:
            qs = qs.par_domaine(domaine)
        if type_mentor:
            qs = qs.par_type(type_mentor)

        return list(qs.order_by("-note_moyenne", "-nombre_evaluations")[:limit])
```

### `apps/community/services/messagerie_service.py`

```python
"""
Service Messagerie — logique métier de la messagerie privée.
"""
import logging
from django.db import transaction
from django.db.models import Q
from django.utils import timezone

from apps.community.models import (
    ConversationPrivee, ParticipantConversation,
    MessagePrive, BlocageUtilisateur,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class MessagerieService:
    """Service de gestion de la messagerie privée."""

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def get_ou_creer_conversation(cls, utilisateur1, utilisateur2) -> ConversationPrivee:
        """
        Récupère la conversation existante entre 2 utilisateurs,
        ou en crée une nouvelle.
        """
        # Vérifier les blocages
        if cls._est_bloque(utilisateur1, utilisateur2):
            raise PermissionError("Vous ne pouvez pas contacter cet utilisateur.")

        # Chercher une conversation existante
        convs = ConversationPrivee.objects.filter(
            is_groupe=False,
            participants=utilisateur1,
        ).filter(participants=utilisateur2)

        if convs.exists():
            return convs.first()

        # Créer une nouvelle conversation
        conversation = ConversationPrivee.objects.create(is_groupe=False)
        conversation.participants.add(utilisateur1, utilisateur2)

        # Créer les participations
        ParticipantConversation.objects.create(
            utilisateur=utilisateur1,
            conversation=conversation,
        )
        ParticipantConversation.objects.create(
            utilisateur=utilisateur2,
            conversation=conversation,
        )

        return conversation

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def envoyer_message(
        cls,
        conversation: ConversationPrivee,
        auteur,
        contenu: str,
        type_contenu: str = "TEXTE",
        fichier_joint=None,
        reponse_a: MessagePrive = None,
    ) -> MessagePrive:
        """Envoie un message dans une conversation."""
        # Vérifier que l'auteur est participant
        if not conversation.participants.filter(pk=auteur.pk).exists():
            raise PermissionError("Vous n'êtes pas participant à cette conversation.")

        # Vérifier les blocages pour les conversations non-groupe
        if not conversation.is_groupe:
            autres = conversation.participants.exclude(pk=auteur.pk)
            for destinataire in autres:
                if cls._est_bloque(auteur, destinataire):
                    raise PermissionError(
                        "Vous ne pouvez pas envoyer de message à cet utilisateur."
                    )

        message = MessagePrive.objects.create(
            conversation=conversation,
            auteur=auteur,
            contenu=contenu,
            type_contenu=type_contenu,
            fichier_joint=fichier_joint,
            reponse_a=reponse_a,
        )

        # Mettre à jour la conversation
        conversation.dernier_message = message
        conversation.dernier_message_at = message.created_at
        conversation.save(update_fields=["dernier_message", "dernier_message_at"])

        return message

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def marquer_comme_lu(
        cls,
        conversation: ConversationPrivee,
        utilisateur,
    ):
        """Marque tous les messages d'une conversation comme lus."""
        participant = ParticipantConversation.objects.get(
            conversation=conversation,
            utilisateur=utilisateur,
        )

        participant.dernier_message_lu = conversation.dernier_message
        participant.date_derniere_lecture = timezone.now()
        participant.save(update_fields=[
            "dernier_message_lu", "date_derniere_lecture"
        ])

    @classmethod
    def get_nombre_non_lus(cls, utilisateur) -> int:
        """Retourne le nombre total de messages non lus."""
        total = 0
        participations = ParticipantConversation.objects.filter(
            utilisateur=utilisateur,
            is_archived=False,
        ).select_related("conversation")

        for p in participations:
            total += p.nombre_non_lus

        return total

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def bloquer_utilisateur(cls, bloqueur, bloque, niveau="BLOQUER"):
        """Bloque un utilisateur."""
        if bloqueur == bloque:
            raise ValueError("Vous ne pouvez pas vous bloquer vous-même.")

        blocage, created = BlocageUtilisateur.objects.get_or_create(
            bloqueur=bloqueur,
            bloque=bloque,
            defaults={"niveau": niveau},
        )

        if not created:
            blocage.niveau = niveau
            blocage.save(update_fields=["niveau"])

        return blocage

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def debloquer_utilisateur(cls, bloqueur, bloque):
        """Débloque un utilisateur."""
        BlocageUtilisateur.objects.filter(
            bloqueur=bloqueur,
            bloque=bloque,
        ).delete()

    @classmethod
    def _est_bloque(cls, utilisateur1, utilisateur2) -> bool:
        """Vérifie si un des deux utilisateurs a bloqué l'autre."""
        return BlocageUtilisateur.objects.filter(
            Q(bloqueur=utilisateur1, bloque=utilisateur2) |
            Q(bloqueur=utilisateur2, bloque=utilisateur1)
        ).exists()

    @classmethod
    def get_liste_conversations(cls, utilisateur) -> list:
        """Retourne la liste des conversations d'un utilisateur avec métadonnées."""
        conversations = ConversationPrivee.objects.filter(
            participants=utilisateur,
        ).select_related("dernier_message__auteur").order_by(
            "-dernier_message_at"
        )

        result = []
        for conv in conversations:
            try:
                participant = ParticipantConversation.objects.get(
                    conversation=conv,
                    utilisateur=utilisateur,
                )

                # Déterminer l'autre participant (pour conversations 1-1)
                autre_participant = None
                if not conv.is_groupe:
                    autres = conv.participants.exclude(pk=utilisateur.pk)
                    autre_participant = autres.first()

                result.append({
                    "conversation": conv,
                    "participant": participant,
                    "non_lus": participant.nombre_non_lus,
                    "autre_participant": autre_participant,
                })
            except ParticipantConversation.DoesNotExist:
                continue

        return result
```

### `apps/community/services/moderation_service.py`

```python
"""
Service Modération — gestion des signalements.
"""
import logging
from django.db import transaction
from django.utils import timezone

from apps.community.models import (
    Signalement, Thread, MessageForum, MessagePrive,
    StatutSignalement,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class ModerationService:
    """Service de modération de la communauté."""

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def signaler_contenu(
        cls,
        auteur,
        type_contenu: str,
        contenu_id: str,
        type_signalement: str,
        description: str = "",
    ) -> Signalement:
        """Signale un contenu."""
        # Récupérer le contenu pour avoir un résumé
        contenu_resume = ""

        if type_contenu == "MESSAGE_FORUM":
            try:
                message = MessageForum.objects.get(id=contenu_id)
                contenu_resume = message.contenu[:200]
                # Incrémenter le compteur de signalements
                message.nombre_signalements += 1
                message.save(update_fields=["nombre_signalements"])
            except MessageForum.DoesNotExist:
                raise ValueError("Message introuvable.")

        elif type_contenu == "THREAD":
            try:
                thread = Thread.objects.get(id=contenu_id)
                contenu_resume = thread.titre
                thread.nombre_signalements += 1
                thread.save(update_fields=["nombre_signalements"])
            except Thread.DoesNotExist:
                raise ValueError("Thread introuvable.")

        elif type_contenu == "MESSAGE_PRIVE":
            try:
                message = MessagePrive.objects.get(id=contenu_id)
                contenu_resume = message.contenu[:200]
            except MessagePrive.DoesNotExist:
                raise ValueError("Message introuvable.")

        signalement = Signalement.objects.create(
            auteur=auteur,
            type_contenu=type_contenu,
            contenu_id=contenu_id,
            contenu_resume=contenu_resume,
            type=type_signalement,
            description=description,
        )

        logger.info(
            f"Signalement créé : {type_signalement} par {auteur.email} "
            f"sur {type_contenu} {contenu_id}"
        )

        return signalement

    @classmethod
    @transaction.atomic
    def traiter_signalement(
        cls,
        signalement: Signalement,
        moderateur,
        decision: str,
        action: str = "",
    ):
        """Traite un signalement."""
        signalement.statut = StatutSignalement.TRAITE
        signalement.traite_par = moderateur
        signalement.date_traitement = timezone.now()
        signalement.decision = decision
        signalement.action_prise = action
        signalement.save()

        # Appliquer l'action si nécessaire
        if action == "SUPPRIMER_CONTENU":
            cls._supprimer_contenu_signale(signalement)
        elif action == "SANCTIONNER_UTILISATEUR":
            # TODO: Système de sanctions (avertissement, suspension, ban)
            pass

        logger.info(
            f"Signalement {signalement.id} traité par {moderateur.email}"
        )

    @classmethod
    def _supprimer_contenu_signale(cls, signalement: Signalement):
        """Supprime le contenu signalé."""
        if signalement.type_contenu == "MESSAGE_FORUM":
            try:
                message = MessageForum.objects.get(id=signalement.contenu_id)
                message.is_supprime = True
                message.motif_moderation = signalement.decision
                message.save(update_fields=["is_supprime", "motif_moderation"])
            except MessageForum.DoesNotExist:
                pass

        elif signalement.type_contenu == "THREAD":
            try:
                thread = Thread.objects.get(id=signalement.contenu_id)
                thread.statut = "SUPPRIME"
                thread.save(update_fields=["statut"])
            except Thread.DoesNotExist:
                pass

    @classmethod
    def get_signalements_en_attente(cls, limit=50) -> list:
        """Retourne les signalements en attente de traitement."""
        return list(
            Signalement.objects.filter(
                statut=StatutSignalement.EN_ATTENTE
            ).order_by("-created_at")[:limit]
        )

    @classmethod
    def get_stats_moderation(cls) -> dict:
        """Statistiques globales de modération."""
        return {
            "total": Signalement.objects.count(),
            "en_attente": Signalement.objects.filter(
                statut=StatutSignalement.EN_ATTENTE
            ).count(),
            "traites": Signalement.objects.filter(
                statut=StatutSignalement.TRAITE
            ).count(),
            "rejetes": Signalement.objects.filter(
                statut=StatutSignalement.REJETE
            ).count(),
            "actions_prises": Signalement.objects.filter(
                statut=StatutSignalement.ACTION_PRISE
            ).count(),
        }
```

## 🔌 4. WebSocket Consumer (Messagerie temps réel)

### `apps/community/consumers.py`

```python
"""
WebSocket Consumer pour la messagerie privée temps réel.
"""
import json
import logging
from channels.generic.websocket import AsyncWebSocketConsumer
from channels.db import database_sync_to_async
from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model

from apps.community.services import MessagerieService

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
User = get_user_model()

class MessagerieConsumer(AsyncWebSocketConsumer):
    """WebSocket consumer pour la messagerie privée."""

    async def connect(self):
        """Connexion WebSocket."""
        self.user = self.scope.get("user")

        if not self.user or not self.user.is_authenticated:
            await self.close(code=4001)
            return

        # Rejoindre le groupe personnel de l'utilisateur
        self.user_group = f"user_{self.user.id}_messages"
        await self.channel_layer.group_add(
            self.user_group,
            self.channel_name,
        )

        await self.accept()

        await self.send(text_data=json.dumps({
            "type": "connection",
            "status": "connected",
            "message": "Connecté à la messagerie",
        }))

    async def disconnect(self, close_code):
        """Déconnexion."""
        if hasattr(self, "user_group"):
            await self.channel_layer.group_discard(
                self.user_group,
                self.channel_name,
            )

    async def receive(self, text_data):
        """Réception d'un message."""
        try:
            data = json.loads(text_data)
            message_type = data.get("type")

            if message_type == "send_message":
                await self.handle_send_message(data)
            elif message_type == "mark_read":
                await self.handle_mark_read(data)
            elif message_type == "ping":
                await self.send(text_data=json.dumps({"type": "pong"}))

        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            await self.send(text_data=json.dumps({
                "type": "error",
                "message": "Format JSON invalide",
            }))
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Erreur WebSocket messagerie: {e}", exc_info=True)

    async def handle_send_message(self, data):
        """Envoie un message dans une conversation."""
        conversation_id = data.get("conversation_id")
        contenu = data.get("content", "").strip()

        if not conversation_id or not contenu:
            await self.send(text_data=json.dumps({
                "type": "error",
                "message": "conversation_id et content requis",
            }))
            return

        try:
            # Envoyer le message (synchrone)
            message = await database_sync_to_async(self._send_message)(
                conversation_id, contenu
            )

            # Notifier tous les participants
            conversation = message.conversation
            participants = await database_sync_to_async(
                lambda: list(conversation.participants.all())
            )()

            for participant in participants:
                await self.channel_layer.group_send(
                    f"user_{participant.id}_messages",
                    {
                        "type": "new_message",
                        "message": {
                            "id": str(message.id),
                            "conversation_id": str(conversation.id),
                            "auteur": {
                                "id": str(message.auteur.id),
                                "nom": message.auteur.get_full_name(),
                                "avatar": message.auteur.avatar.url if message.auteur.avatar else None,
                            },
                            "contenu": message.contenu,
                            "type_contenu": message.type_contenu,
                            "created_at": message.created_at.isoformat(),
                        },
                    },
                )

        except PermissionError as e:
            await self.send(text_data=json.dumps({
                "type": "error",
                "message": str(e),
            }))
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Erreur envoi message: {e}", exc_info=True)
            await self.send(text_data=json.dumps({
                "type": "error",
                "message": "Erreur lors de l'envoi du message",
            }))

    async def handle_mark_read(self, data):
        """Marque une conversation comme lue."""
        conversation_id = data.get("conversation_id")
        if conversation_id:
            await database_sync_to_async(self._mark_read)(conversation_id)

    @database_sync_to_async
    def _send_message(self, conversation_id, contenu):
        from apps.community.models import ConversationPrivee
        conversation = ConversationPrivee.objects.get(id=conversation_id)
        return MessagerieService.envoyer_message(
            conversation, self.user, contenu
        )

    @database_sync_to_async
    def _mark_read(self, conversation_id):
        from apps.community.models import ConversationPrivee
        conversation = ConversationPrivee.objects.get(id=conversation_id)
        MessagerieService.marquer_comme_lu(conversation, self.user)

    # Handlers pour les messages de groupe
    async def new_message(self, event):
        """Reçoit un nouveau message du groupe."""
        await self.send(text_data=json.dumps({
            "type": "new_message",
            "message": event["message"],
        }))
```

"""
WebSocket routing pour la messagerie.
"""
from django.urls import re_path
from . import consumers

websocket_urlpatterns = [
    re_path(r"ws/messagerie/$", consumers.MessagerieConsumer.as_asgi()),
]

## 🌐 5. API REST

### `apps/community/api/serializers.py`

```python
"""
Serializers DRF pour l'API community.
"""
from rest_framework import serializers

from apps.community.models import (
    Forum, Thread, MessageForum, AbonnementForum,
    ProfilMentor, RelationMentorat, SeanceMentorat,
    ConversationPrivee, MessagePrive,
    Signalement, BlocageUtilisateur,
)
from apps.accounts.api.serializers import UserMinimalSerializer

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Forums
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class ForumSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    type_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_type_display", read_only=True)
    is_abonne = serializers.SerializerMethodField()

    class Meta:
        model = Forum
        fields = [
            "id", "nom", "slug", "description", "icone", "couleur",
            "type", "type_display", "regles", "acces_restreint",
            "nombre_threads", "nombre_messages", "nombre_abonnes",
            "dernier_message_at", "is_featured", "is_abonne",
        ]

    def get_is_abonne(self, obj):
        request = self.context.get("request")
        if not request or not request.user.is_authenticated:
            return False
        return AbonnementForum.objects.filter(
            utilisateur=request.user, forum=obj
        ).exists()

class ThreadListSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    auteur_detail = UserMinimalSerializer(source="auteur", read_only=True)
    statut_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_statut_display", read_only=True)
    est_resolu = serializers.BooleanField(read_only=True)
    dernier_message_auteur = UserMinimalSerializer(
        source="dernier_message.auteur", read_only=True, default=None
    )

    class Meta:
        model = Thread
        fields = [
            "id", "titre", "slug", "forum",
            "auteur", "auteur_detail",
            "tags", "statut", "statut_display",
            "is_epingle", "is_ferme", "est_resolu",
            "nombre_reponses", "nombre_vues",
            "dernier_message_at", "dernier_message_auteur",
            "created_at",
        ]

class ThreadDetailSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    auteur_detail = UserMinimalSerializer(source="auteur", read_only=True)
    statut_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_statut_display", read_only=True)
    est_resolu = serializers.BooleanField(read_only=True)
    forum_nom = serializers.CharField(source="forum.nom", read_only=True)
    solution_detail = serializers.SerializerMethodField()

    class Meta:
        model = Thread
        fields = [
            "id", "titre", "slug", "contenu",
            "forum", "forum_nom",
            "auteur", "auteur_detail",
            "tags", "statut", "statut_display",
            "is_epingle", "is_ferme", "est_resolu",
            "nombre_reponses", "nombre_vues", "nombre_signalements",
            "dernier_message_at", "solution_detail",
            "created_at", "updated_at",
        ]

    def get_solution_detail(self, obj):
        if obj.reponse_solution:
            return {
                "id": str(obj.reponse_solution.id),
                "auteur": UserMinimalSerializer(obj.reponse_solution.auteur).data,
                "contenu": obj.reponse_solution.contenu[:200],
            }
        return None

class MessageForumSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    auteur_detail = UserMinimalSerializer(source="auteur", read_only=True)
    type_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_type_display", read_only=True)
    reponse_a_auteur = UserMinimalSerializer(
        source="reponse_a.auteur", read_only=True, default=None
    )
    is_liked = serializers.SerializerMethodField()

    class Meta:
        model = MessageForum
        fields = [
            "id", "thread", "auteur", "auteur_detail",
            "contenu", "type", "type_display",
            "reponse_a", "reponse_a_auteur",
            "pieces_jointes",
            "nombre_likes", "nombre_signalements",
            "is_solution", "is_edite", "is_supprime",
            "is_liked", "created_at", "edited_at",
        ]

    def get_is_liked(self, obj):
        request = self.context.get("request")
        if not request or not request.user.is_authenticated:
            return False
        return obj.likes.filter(utilisateur=request.user).exists()

class ThreadCreateSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    forum_id = serializers.UUIDField()
    titre = serializers.CharField(max_length=255)
    contenu = serializers.CharField()
    tags = serializers.ListField(
        child=serializers.CharField(), required=False, default=list
    )

class MessageForumCreateSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    contenu = serializers.CharField()
    reponse_a_id = serializers.UUIDField(required=False, allow_null=True)

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Mentorat
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class ProfilMentorSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    utilisateur_detail = UserMinimalSerializer(source="utilisateur", read_only=True)
    type_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_type_mentor_display", read_only=True)
    places_disponibles = serializers.IntegerField(read_only=True)
    peut_accepter = serializers.BooleanField(source="peut_accepter_mentore", read_only=True)

    class Meta:
        model = ProfilMentor
        fields = [
            "id", "utilisateur", "utilisateur_detail",
            "type_mentor", "type_display",
            "bio", "domaines_expertise", "competences",
            "annees_experience", "diplomes",
            "is_disponible", "places_disponibles", "peut_accepter",
            "creneaux_disponibles", "formats_proposes", "langues_parlees",
            "nombre_mentores_actuels", "nombre_mentores_total",
            "note_moyenne", "nombre_evaluations",
            "is_verifie",
        ]

class RelationMentoratSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    mentor_detail = ProfilMentorSerializer(source="mentor", read_only=True)
    mentoré_detail = UserMinimalSerializer(source="mentoré", read_only=True)
    statut_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_statut_display", read_only=True)
    duree_jours = serializers.IntegerField(read_only=True)

    class Meta:
        model = RelationMentorat
        fields = [
            "id", "mentor", "mentor_detail",
            "mentoré", "mentoré_detail",
            "statut", "statut_display",
            "motif_demande", "objectifs",
            "date_demande", "date_reponse", "date_debut", "date_fin",
            "nombre_seances", "derniere_seance",
            "duree_jours",
            "evaluation_mentore", "evaluation_mentor",
        ]

class DemandeMentoratSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    mentor_id = serializers.UUIDField()
    motif = serializers.CharField(required=False, allow_blank=True)
    objectifs = serializers.ListField(
        child=serializers.CharField(), required=False, default=list
    )

class SeanceMentoratSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    class Meta:
        model = SeanceMentorat
        fields = [
            "id", "relation", "titre", "description",
            "date_prevue", "duree_minutes", "format",
            "lien_visio", "statut",
            "compte_rendu", "prochaines_etapes",
            "created_at",
        ]

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Messagerie
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class MessagePriveSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    auteur_detail = UserMinimalSerializer(source="auteur", read_only=True)

    class Meta:
        model = MessagePrive
        fields = [
            "id", "conversation", "auteur", "auteur_detail",
            "contenu", "type_contenu", "fichier_joint",
            "statut", "is_edite", "is_supprime",
            "reponse_a", "created_at", "edited_at", "lu_at",
        ]

class ConversationPriveeSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    dernier_message_detail = MessagePriveSerializer(
        source="dernier_message", read_only=True, default=None
    )
    autre_participant = serializers.SerializerMethodField()
    nombre_non_lus = serializers.SerializerMethodField()

    class Meta:
        model = ConversationPrivee
        fields = [
            "id", "titre", "is_groupe",
            "dernier_message", "dernier_message_detail",
            "dernier_message_at",
            "autre_participant", "nombre_non_lus",
            "created_at",
        ]

    def get_autre_participant(self, obj):
        request = self.context.get("request")
        if not request or obj.is_groupe:
            return None
        autres = obj.participants.exclude(pk=request.user.pk).first()
        if autres:
            return UserMinimalSerializer(autres).data
        return None

    def get_nombre_non_lus(self, obj):
        request = self.context.get("request")
        if not request:
            return 0
        try:
            from apps.community.models import ParticipantConversation
            participant = ParticipantConversation.objects.get(
                conversation=obj, utilisateur=request.user
            )
            return participant.nombre_non_lus
        except ParticipantConversation.DoesNotExist:
            return 0

class MessagePriveCreateSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    conversation_id = serializers.UUIDField()
    contenu = serializers.CharField()
    type_contenu = serializers.ChoiceField(
        choices=["TEXTE", "IMAGE", "FICHIER"],
        default="TEXTE",
    )

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Modération
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class SignalementSerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    auteur_detail = UserMinimalSerializer(source="auteur", read_only=True)
    type_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_type_display", read_only=True)
    statut_display = serializers.CharField(source="get_statut_display", read_only=True)

    class Meta:
        model = Signalement
        fields = [
            "id", "auteur", "auteur_detail",
            "type_contenu", "contenu_id", "contenu_resume",
            "type", "type_display", "description",
            "statut", "statut_display",
            "traite_par", "date_traitement", "decision", "action_prise",
            "created_at",
        ]

class SignalementCreateSerializer(serializers.Serializer):
    type_contenu = serializers.ChoiceField(
        choices=["MESSAGE_FORUM", "THREAD", "MESSAGE_PRIVE", "UTILISATEUR", "MENTOR"]
    )
    contenu_id = serializers.UUIDField()
    type = serializers.ChoiceField(
        choices=["SPAM", "HARCELEMENT", "INAPPROPRIE", "DESINFORMATION", "USURPATION", "AUTRE"]
    )
    description = serializers.CharField(required=False, allow_blank=True)
```

### `apps/community/api/views.py`

```python
"""
Vues API pour l'app community.
"""
from django.db.models import F
from rest_framework import generics, status, viewsets
from rest_framework.decorators import action
from rest_framework.permissions import IsAuthenticated, AllowAny
from rest_framework.response import Response
from rest_framework.views import APIView

from apps.community.models import (
    Forum, Thread, MessageForum, AbonnementForum,
    ProfilMentor, RelationMentorat, SeanceMentorat,
    ConversationPrivee, MessagePrive,
    Signalement,
)
from apps.community.services import (
    ForumService, MentoratService, MessagerieService, ModerationService,
)

from .serializers import (
    ForumSerializer, ThreadListSerializer, ThreadDetailSerializer,
    MessageForumSerializer, ThreadCreateSerializer, MessageForumCreateSerializer,
    ProfilMentorSerializer, RelationMentoratSerializer,
    DemandeMentoratSerializer, SeanceMentoratSerializer,
    ConversationPriveeSerializer, MessagePriveSerializer,
    MessagePriveCreateSerializer,
    SignalementSerializer, SignalementCreateSerializer,
)

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Forums
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class ForumViewSet(viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet):
    """Liste et détail des forums."""
    serializer_class = ForumSerializer
    permission_classes = [AllowAny]
    lookup_field = "slug"

    def get_queryset(self):
        qs = Forum.objects.actifs()

        type_forum = self.request.query_params.get("type")
        if type_forum:
            qs = qs.filter(type=type_forum)

        return qs

    @action(detail=False, methods=["get"])
    def featured(self, request):
        forums = Forum.objects.featured()
        return Response(ForumSerializer(forums, many=True).data)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"], permission_classes=[IsAuthenticated])
    def subscribe(self, request, slug=None):
        forum = self.get_object()
        ForumService.abonner_utilisateur(request.user, forum)
        return Response({"message": "Abonnement enregistré."})

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"], permission_classes=[IsAuthenticated])
    def unsubscribe(self, request, slug=None):
        forum = self.get_object()
        ForumService.desabonner_utilisateur(request.user, forum)
        return Response({"message": "Désabonnement enregistré."})

class ThreadViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
    """CRUD des threads."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]
    lookup_field = "slug"

    def get_queryset(self):
        qs = Thread.objects.actifs().select_related("auteur", "forum", "dernier_message__auteur")

        forum_slug = self.request.query_params.get("forum")
        if forum_slug:
            qs = qs.filter(forum__slug=forum_slug)

        tag = self.request.query_params.get("tag")
        if tag:
            qs = qs.filter(tags__contains=[tag])

        resolu = self.request.query_params.get("resolu")
        if resolu == "true":
            qs = qs.resolu()
        elif resolu == "false":
            qs = qs.non_resolu()

        return qs

    def get_serializer_class(self):
        if self.action == "retrieve":
            return ThreadDetailSerializer
        return ThreadListSerializer

    def create(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
        serializer = ThreadCreateSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        data = serializer.validated_data

        try:
            forum = Forum.objects.get(id=data["forum_id"])
        except Forum.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Forum introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )

        try:
            thread = ForumService.creer_thread(
                forum=forum,
                auteur=request.user,
                titre=data["titre"],
                contenu=data["contenu"],
                tags=data.get("tags"),
            )
            return Response(
                ThreadDetailSerializer(thread).data,
                status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
            )
        except PermissionError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)

    def retrieve(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
        thread = self.get_object()
        ForumService.incrementer_vues(thread)
        return Response(ThreadDetailSerializer(thread).data)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["get"], permission_classes=[AllowAny])
    def messages(self, request, slug=None):
        """Liste des messages d'un thread."""
        thread = self.get_object()
        messages = MessageForum.objects.valides().filter(
            thread=thread
        ).select_related("auteur", "reponse_a__auteur")

        page = self.paginate_queryset(messages)
        if page is not None:
            serializer = MessageForumSerializer(
                page, many=True, context={"request": request}
            )
            return self.get_paginated_response(serializer.data)

        serializer = MessageForumSerializer(
            messages, many=True, context={"request": request}
        )
        return Response(serializer.data)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"])
    def repondre(self, request, slug=None):
        """Répond à un thread."""
        thread = self.get_object()
        serializer = MessageForumCreateSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        reponse_a = None
        if serializer.validated_data.get("reponse_a_id"):
            try:
                reponse_a = MessageForum.objects.get(
                    id=serializer.validated_data["reponse_a_id"],
                    thread=thread,
                )
            except MessageForum.DoesNotExist:
                pass

        try:
            message = ForumService.repondre_thread(
                thread=thread,
                auteur=request.user,
                contenu=serializer.validated_data["contenu"],
                reponse_a=reponse_a,
            )
            return Response(
                MessageForumSerializer(message, context={"request": request}).data,
                status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
            )
        except PermissionError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"])
    def marquer_solution(self, request, slug=None):
        """Marque un message comme solution."""
        thread = self.get_object()
        message_id = request.data.get("message_id")

        if not message_id:
            return Response(
                {"error": "message_id requis."},
                status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            )

        try:
            message = MessageForum.objects.get(id=message_id, thread=thread)
            ForumService.marquer_comme_solution(thread, message, request.user)
            return Response({"message": "Solution marquée."})
        except MessageForum.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Message introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )
        except PermissionError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)

class MessageForumLikeView(APIView):
    """Like/unlike un message de forum."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def post(self, request, message_id):
        try:
            message = MessageForum.objects.get(id=message_id)
        except MessageForum.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Message introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )

        added = ForumService.toggle_like(request.user, message)
        message.refresh_from_db()

        return Response({
            "liked": added,
            "nombre_likes": message.nombre_likes,
        })

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Mentorat
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class MentorViewSet(viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet):
    """Liste des mentors disponibles."""
    serializer_class = ProfilMentorSerializer
    permission_classes = [AllowAny]

    def get_queryset(self):
        qs = ProfilMentor.objects.select_related("utilisateur")

        disponible = self.request.query_params.get("disponible")
        if disponible == "true":
            qs = qs.disponibles()

        type_mentor = self.request.query_params.get("type")
        if type_mentor:
            qs = qs.par_type(type_mentor)

        domaine = self.request.query_params.get("domaine")
        if domaine:
            qs = qs.par_domaine(domaine)

        return qs

    @action(detail=False, methods=["get"])
    def top(self, request):
        """Top mentors par note."""
        limit = int(request.query_params.get("limit", 10))
        mentors = ProfilMentor.objects.top_notes(limit)
        return Response(ProfilMentorSerializer(mentors, many=True).data)

class MentoratViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
    """Gestion des relations de mentorat."""
    serializer_class = RelationMentoratSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]
    http_method_names = ["get", "post", "patch"]

    def get_queryset(self):
        user = self.request.user

        # Étudiant : voir ses mentorats
        if user.role == "STUDENT":
            return RelationMentorat.objects.filter(mentoré=user)

        # Mentor : voir ses mentorés
        try:
            profil_mentor = user.profil_mentor
            return RelationMentorat.objects.filter(mentor=profil_mentor)
        except ProfilMentor.DoesNotExist:
            return RelationMentorat.objects.none()

    @action(detail=False, methods=["post"])
    def demander(self, request):
        """Demande un mentorat."""
        serializer = DemandeMentoratSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        data = serializer.validated_data

        try:
            mentor = ProfilMentor.objects.get(id=data["mentor_id"])
        except ProfilMentor.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Mentor introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )

        try:
            relation = MentoratService.demander_mentorat(
                mentor=mentor,
                mentoré=request.user,
                motif=data.get("motif", ""),
                objectifs=data.get("objectifs"),
            )
            return Response(
                RelationMentoratSerializer(relation).data,
                status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
            )
        except ValueError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"])
    def accepter(self, request, pk=None):
        """Accepte une demande de mentorat."""
        relation = self.get_object()
        try:
            MentoratService.accepter_mentorat(relation)
            return Response(RelationMentoratSerializer(relation).data)
        except ValueError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"])
    def refuser(self, request, pk=None):
        """Refuse une demande."""
        relation = self.get_object()
        motif = request.data.get("motif", "")
        MentoratService.refuser_mentorat(relation, motif)
        return Response(RelationMentoratSerializer(relation).data)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"])
    def terminer(self, request, pk=None):
        """Termine un mentorat avec évaluation."""
        relation = self.get_object()
        MentoratService.terminer_mentorat(
            relation,
            evaluation_mentore=request.data.get("evaluation_mentore"),
            evaluation_mentor=request.data.get("evaluation_mentor"),
        )
        return Response(RelationMentoratSerializer(relation).data)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["post"])
    def planifier_seance(self, request, pk=None):
        """Planifie une séance."""
        relation = self.get_object()

        try:
            from django.utils import timezone
            from datetime import datetime

            date_str = request.data.get("date_prevue")
            date_prevue = datetime.fromisoformat(date_str.replace("Z", "+00:00"))

            seance = MentoratService.planifier_seance(
                relation=relation,
                titre=request.data.get("titre", "Séance de mentorat"),
                date_prevue=date_prevue,
                duree_minutes=int(request.data.get("duree_minutes", 60)),
                format_seance=request.data.get("format", "CHAT"),
                description=request.data.get("description", ""),
            )

            return Response(
                SeanceMentoratSerializer(seance).data,
                status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
            )
        except ValueError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)

    @action(detail=True, methods=["get"])
    def seances(self, request, pk=None):
        """Liste des séances d'un mentorat."""
        relation = self.get_object()
        seances = relation.seances.all()
        return Response(SeanceMentoratSerializer(seances, many=True).data)

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Messagerie
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class ConversationViewSet(viewsets.ReadOnlyModelViewSet):
    """Liste des conversations de l'utilisateur."""
    serializer_class = ConversationPriveeSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def get_queryset(self):
        return ConversationPrivee.objects.filter(
            participants=self.request.user,
        ).select_related("dernier_message__auteur")

    @action(detail=False, methods=["get"])
    def non_lus(self, request):
        """Nombre total de messages non lus."""
        total = MessagerieService.get_nombre_non_lus(request.user)
        return Response({"nombre_non_lus": total})

class ConversationCreateView(APIView):
    """Crée ou récupère une conversation avec un utilisateur."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def post(self, request):
        utilisateur_id = request.data.get("utilisateur_id")

        if not utilisateur_id:
            return Response(
                {"error": "utilisateur_id requis."},
                status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            )

        from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model
        User = get_user_model()

        try:
            destinataire = User.objects.get(id=utilisateur_id)
        except User.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Utilisateur introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )

        try:
            conversation = MessagerieService.get_ou_creer_conversation(
                request.user, destinataire
            )
            return Response(
                ConversationPriveeSerializer(
                    conversation, context={"request": request}
                ).data,
                status=status.HTTP_200_OK,
            )
        except PermissionError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)

class MessagePriveViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
    """Gestion des messages privés."""
    serializer_class = MessagePriveSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]
    http_method_names = ["get", "post", "delete"]

    def get_queryset(self):
        conversation_id = self.request.query_params.get("conversation")
        if conversation_id:
            return MessagePrive.objects.filter(
                conversation_id=conversation_id,
                conversation__participants=self.request.user,
                is_supprime=False,
            ).select_related("auteur")
        return MessagePrive.objects.none()

    def create(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
        serializer = MessagePriveCreateSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        data = serializer.validated_data

        try:
            conversation = ConversationPrivee.objects.get(id=data["conversation_id"])
        except ConversationPrivee.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Conversation introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )

        try:
            message = MessagerieService.envoyer_message(
                conversation=conversation,
                auteur=request.user,
                contenu=data["contenu"],
                type_contenu=data.get("type_contenu", "TEXTE"),
            )
            return Response(
                MessagePriveSerializer(message).data,
                status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
            )
        except PermissionError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN)

    @action(detail=False, methods=["post"])
    def mark_read(self, request):
        """Marque une conversation comme lue."""
        conversation_id = request.data.get("conversation_id")
        if not conversation_id:
            return Response(
                {"error": "conversation_id requis."},
                status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            )

        try:
            conversation = ConversationPrivee.objects.get(
                id=conversation_id,
                participants=request.user,
            )
            MessagerieService.marquer_comme_lu(conversation, request.user)
            return Response({"message": "Conversation marquée comme lue."})
        except ConversationPrivee.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Conversation introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Modération
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

class SignalementViewSet(viewsets.ModelViewSet):
    """Gestion des signalements."""
    serializer_class = SignalementSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]
    http_method_names = ["get", "post"]

    def get_queryset(self):
        user = self.request.user
        if user.role == "ADMIN" or user.is_superuser:
            return Signalement.objects.all()
        return Signalement.objects.filter(auteur=user)

    def create(self, request, *args, **kwargs):
        serializer = SignalementCreateSerializer(data=request.data)
        serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)

        data = serializer.validated_data

        try:
            signalement = ModerationService.signaler_contenu(
                auteur=request.user,
                type_contenu=data["type_contenu"],
                contenu_id=str(data["contenu_id"]),
                type_signalement=data["type"],
                description=data.get("description", ""),
            )
            return Response(
                SignalementSerializer(signalement).data,
                status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
            )
        except ValueError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)

class BlocageView(APIView):
    """Gestion des blocages entre utilisateurs."""
    permission_classes = [IsAuthenticated]

    def post(self, request):
        """Bloque un utilisateur."""
        utilisateur_id = request.data.get("utilisateur_id")
        niveau = request.data.get("niveau", "BLOQUER")

        if not utilisateur_id:
            return Response(
                {"error": "utilisateur_id requis."},
                status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            )

        from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model
        User = get_user_model()

        try:
            bloque = User.objects.get(id=utilisateur_id)
            blocage = MessagerieService.bloquer_utilisateur(
                request.user, bloque, niveau
            )
            return Response({"message": "Utilisateur bloqué."})
        except User.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Utilisateur introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )
        except ValueError as e:
            return Response({"error": str(e)}, status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST)

    def delete(self, request):
        """Débloque un utilisateur."""
        utilisateur_id = request.data.get("utilisateur_id")

        if not utilisateur_id:
            return Response(
                {"error": "utilisateur_id requis."},
                status=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
            )

        from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model
        User = get_user_model()

        try:
            bloque = User.objects.get(id=utilisateur_id)
            MessagerieService.debloquer_utilisateur(request.user, bloque)
            return Response({"message": "Utilisateur débloqué."})
        except User.DoesNotExist:
            return Response(
                {"error": "Utilisateur introuvable."},
                status=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
            )
```

### `apps/community/api/urls.py`

```python
"""
URLs de l'API community.
"""
from django.urls import path, include
from rest_framework.routers import DefaultRouter

from . import views

app_name = "community-api"

router = DefaultRouter()
router.register(r"forums", views.ForumViewSet, basename="forums")
router.register(r"threads", views.ThreadViewSet, basename="threads")
router.register(r"mentors", views.MentorViewSet, basename="mentors")
router.register(r"mentorats", views.MentoratViewSet, basename="mentorats")
router.register(r"conversations", views.ConversationViewSet, basename="conversations")
router.register(r"messages", views.MessagePriveViewSet, basename="messages")
router.register(r"signalements", views.SignalementViewSet, basename="signalements")

urlpatterns = [
    # Messages forum
    path(
        "messages-forum/<uuid:message_id>/like/",
        views.MessageForumLikeView.as_view(),
        name="message-like",
    ),

    # Conversations
    path(
        "conversations/create/",
        views.ConversationCreateView.as_view(),
        name="conversations-create",
    ),

    # Blocages
    path(
        "blocages/",
        views.BlocageView.as_view(),
        name="blocages",
    ),

    # Router
    path("", include(router.urls)),
]
```

---

## 🎨 6. Admin Django

### `apps/community/admin.py`

```python
"""
Admin Django pour l'app community.
"""
from django.contrib import admin
from django.utils.html import format_html
from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _

from .models import (
    Forum, Thread, MessageForum, AbonnementForum,
    ProfilMentor, RelationMentorat, SeanceMentorat,
    ConversationPrivee, MessagePrive,
    Signalement, BlocageUtilisateur,
)

@admin.register(Forum)
class ForumAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "icone_affiche", "nom", "type", "nombre_threads",
        "nombre_messages", "is_active", "is_featured",
    ]
    list_filter = ["type", "is_active", "is_featured"]
    search_fields = ["nom", "description"]
    prepopulated_fields = {"slug": ("nom",)}

    def icone_affiche(self, obj):
        return format_html('<span style="font-size: 1.5em;">{}</span>', obj.icone)
    icone_affiche.short_description = _("Icône")

@admin.register(Thread)
class ThreadAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "titre", "forum", "auteur", "statut",
        "nombre_reponses", "nombre_vues", "est_resolu_affichage",
        "created_at",
    ]
    list_filter = ["statut", "forum", "is_epingle"]
    search_fields = ["titre", "contenu", "auteur__email"]
    readonly_fields = ["nombre_reponses", "nombre_vues", "created_at"]

    def est_resolu_affichage(self, obj):
        if obj.est_resolu:
            return format_html('<span style="color: green;">✅ Résolu</span>')
        return format_html('<span style="color: orange;">⏳ Non résolu</span>')
    est_resolu_affichage.short_description = _("Résolution")

@admin.register(MessageForum)
class MessageForumAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "thread", "auteur", "type", "nombre_likes",
        "is_solution", "est_valide", "is_supprime", "created_at",
    ]
    list_filter = ["type", "is_solution", "est_valide", "is_supprime"]
    search_fields = ["contenu", "auteur__email", "thread__titre"]

@admin.register(ProfilMentor)
class ProfilMentorAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "utilisateur", "type_mentor", "is_disponible",
        "nombre_mentores_actuels", "note_moyenne",
        "is_verifie",
    ]
    list_filter = ["type_mentor", "is_disponible", "is_verifie"]
    search_fields = [
        "utilisateur__email",
        "utilisateur__first_name",
        "bio",
    ]

    actions = ["verifier_profils", "deverifier_profils"]

    @admin.action(description="✅ Vérifier les profils sélectionnés")
    def verifier_profils(self, request, queryset):
        from django.utils import timezone
        count = queryset.update(
            is_verifie=True,
            date_verification=timezone.now(),
        )
        self.message_user(request, f"{count} profil(s) vérifié(s).")

    @admin.action(description="❌ Dévérifier")
    def deverifier_profils(self, request, queryset):
        count = queryset.update(is_verifie=False)
        self.message_user(request, f"{count} profil(s) dévérifié(s).")

@admin.register(RelationMentorat)
class RelationMentoratAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "mentor", "mentoré", "statut",
        "date_demande", "nombre_seances",
    ]
    list_filter = ["statut"]
    search_fields = [
        "mentor__utilisateur__email",
        "mentoré__email",
    ]

@admin.register(ConversationPrivee)
class ConversationPriveeAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = ["id", "is_groupe", "dernier_message_at", "created_at"]
    list_filter = ["is_groupe"]

@admin.register(Signalement)
class SignalementAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = [
        "type_contenu", "type", "auteur",
        "statut", "created_at",
    ]
    list_filter = ["statut", "type", "type_contenu"]
    search_fields = ["contenu_resume", "description", "auteur__email"]

    actions = ["traiter_signalements"]

    @admin.action(description="✅ Marquer comme traités")
    def traiter_signalements(self, request, queryset):
        from django.utils import timezone
        count = queryset.update(
            statut="TRAITE",
            traite_par=request.user,
            date_traitement=timezone.now(),
        )
        self.message_user(request, f"{count} signalement(s) traité(s).")

@admin.register(BlocageUtilisateur)
class BlocageUtilisateurAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = ["bloqueur", "bloque", "niveau", "created_at"]
    list_filter = ["niveau"]
```

---

## 🧪 7. Tests

### `apps/community/tests/factories.py`

```python
"""
Factories pour les tests community.
"""
import factory
from factory.django import DjangoModelFactory

from apps.community.models import (
    Forum, Thread, MessageForum, ProfilMentor,
    RelationMentorat, ConversationPrivee, MessagePrive,
)
from apps.accounts.tests.factories import StudentFactory

class ForumFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = Forum

    nom = factory.Sequence(lambda n: f"Forum {n}")
    type = "GENERAL"
    is_active = True

class ThreadFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = Thread

    forum = factory.SubFactory(ForumFactory)
    auteur = factory.SubFactory(StudentFactory)
    titre = factory.Sequence(lambda n: f"Thread {n}")
    contenu = factory.Faker("paragraph")
    statut = "OUVERT"

class MessageForumFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = MessageForum

    thread = factory.SubFactory(ThreadFactory)
    auteur = factory.SubFactory(StudentFactory)
    contenu = factory.Faker("sentence")

class ProfilMentorFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = ProfilMentor

    utilisateur = factory.SubFactory(StudentFactory)
    type_mentor = "PAIR"
    is_disponible = True
    nombre_mentores_max = 5
    nombre_mentores_actuels = 0

class ConversationPriveeFactory(DjangoModelFactory):
    class Meta:
        model = ConversationPrivee

    is_groupe = False
```

### `apps/community/tests/test_services.py`

```python
"""
Tests des services community.
"""
import pytest

from apps.community.services import (
    ForumService, MentoratService, MessagerieService,
)
from apps.community.tests.factories import (
    ForumFactory, ThreadFactory, ProfilMentorFactory,
)
from apps.accounts.tests.factories import StudentFactory

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestForumService:
    def test_creer_thread(self):
        forum = ForumFactory()
        auteur = StudentFactory()

        thread = ForumService.creer_thread(
            forum=forum,
            auteur=auteur,
            titre="Mon premier thread",
            contenu="Contenu du thread",
        )

        assert thread is not None
        assert thread.titre == "Mon premier thread"
        assert thread.forum == forum
        assert thread.auteur == auteur
        assert thread.messages.count() == 1

    def test_repondre_thread(self):
        thread = ThreadFactory()
        repondant = StudentFactory()

        message = ForumService.repondre_thread(
            thread=thread,
            auteur=repondant,
            contenu="Ma réponse",
        )

        assert message is not None
        assert message.contenu == "Ma réponse"
        thread.refresh_from_db()
        assert thread.nombre_reponses == 1

    def test_toggle_like(self):
        from apps.community.tests.factories import MessageForumFactory
        message = MessageForumFactory()
        utilisateur = StudentFactory()

        # Ajouter like
        added = ForumService.toggle_like(utilisateur, message)
        assert added is True
        message.refresh_from_db()
        assert message.nombre_likes == 1

        # Retirer like
        added = ForumService.toggle_like(utilisateur, message)
        assert added is False
        message.refresh_from_db()
        assert message.nombre_likes == 0

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestMentoratService:
    def test_demander_mentorat(self):
        mentor = ProfilMentorFactory()
        mentore = StudentFactory()

        relation = MentoratService.demander_mentorat(
            mentor=mentor,
            mentoré=mentore,
            motif="J'ai besoin d'aide",
        )

        assert relation is not None
        assert relation.mentor == mentor
        assert relation.mentoré == mentore
        assert relation.statut == "EN_ATTENTE"

    def test_accepter_mentorat(self):
        mentor = ProfilMentorFactory()
        mentore = StudentFactory()
        relation = MentoratService.demander_mentorat(mentor, mentore)

        MentoratService.accepter_mentorat(relation)

        relation.refresh_from_db()
        assert relation.statut == "ACCEPTE"
        assert relation.date_debut is not None

@pytest.mark.django_db
class TestMessagerieService:
    def test_creer_conversation(self):
        u1 = StudentFactory()
        u2 = StudentFactory()

        conv = MessagerieService.get_ou_creer_conversation(u1, u2)

        assert conv is not None
        assert u1 in conv.participants.all()
        assert u2 in conv.participants.all()

    def test_envoyer_message(self):
        u1 = StudentFactory()
        u2 = StudentFactory()
        conv = MessagerieService.get_ou_creer_conversation(u1, u2)

        message = MessagerieService.envoyer_message(
            conversation=conv,
            auteur=u1,
            contenu="Bonjour !",
        )

        assert message is not None
        assert message.contenu == "Bonjour !"
        assert message.auteur == u1
```

| Factories de test                                                     | ✅      |

# 🚀 MODULE 9 — Application `notifications` (Email, Push, SMS, In-App)

Voici le **Module 9** complet du projet **AvenSU-Orienta**. Ce module constitue le **système centralisé de notifications** de la plateforme : il gère l'envoi de messages via plusieurs canaux (email, push mobile, SMS, in-app), les templates personnalisables, les préférences utilisateur, les files d'attente et l'historique complet des communications.

---
